org.springframework.security.authentication.AuthenticationManager;\nimport org.springframework.security.config.annotation.authentication.configuration.AuthenticationConfiguration;\nimport org.springframework.security.config.annotation.method.configuration.EnableMethodSecurity;\nimport org.springframework.security.config.annotation.web.builders.HttpSecurity;\nimport org.springframework.security.config.http.SessionCreationPolicy;\nimport org.springframework.security.crypto.bcrypt.BCryptPasswordEncoder;\nimport org.springframework.security.crypto.password.PasswordEncoder;\nimport org.springframework.security.web.SecurityFilterChain;\nimport org.springframework.security.web.authentication.UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter;\n\n@Configuration\n@EnableMethodSecurity\npublic class SecurityConfig {\n\n    private final JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter;\n\n    public SecurityConfig(JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter) {\n        this.jwtAuthenticationFilter = jwtAuthenticationFilter;\n    }\n\n    @Bean\n    public SecurityFilterChain securityFilterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception {\n        http\n            .csrf(csrf -> csrf.disable())\n            .sessionManagement(session -> session.sessionCreationPolicy(SessionCreationPolicy.STATELESS))\n            .exceptionHandling(ex -> ex\n                .authenticationEntryPoint((request, response, authException) ->\n                    response.sendError(HttpServletResponse.SC_UNAUTHORIZED, \"Unauthorized\"))\n                .accessDeniedHandler((request, response, accessDeniedException) ->\n                    response.sendError(HttpServletResponse.SC_FORBIDDEN, \"Forbidden\"))\n            )\n            .authorizeHttpRequests(auth -> auth\n                .requestMatchers(\n                    \"/api/v1/catalog/**\",\n                    \"/api/v1/booking/slots/*/seats\",          // public seat map view (no auth needed)\n                    \"/api/v1/booking/slots/*/availability\",   // public GA availability check\n                    \"/api/v1/admin/orgs/*/eventbrite/callback\",\n                    \"/admin/v1/webhooks/eventbrite\",\n                    \"/api/v1/auth/register\",\n                    \"/api/v1/auth/login\",\n                    \"/api/v1/auth/token/refresh\",\n                    \"/api/v1/auth/password/reset\",\n                    \"/api/v1/auth/password/reset/confirm\",\n                    \"/internal/**\"                            // server-to-server internal module calls\n                ).permitAll()\n                .anyRequest().authenticated()\n            )\n            .addFilterBefore(jwtAuthenticationFilter, UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter.class);\n        return http.build();\n    }\n\n    @Bean\n    public PasswordEncoder passwordEncoder() {\n        return new BCryptPasswordEncoder();\n    }\n\n    @Bean\n    public AuthenticationManager authenticationManager(AuthenticationConfiguration configuration) throws Exception {\n        return configuration.getAuthenticationManager();\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

## Entry 131
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T17:24:10.648Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T17:24:10.648Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call_output",
    "call_id": "call_zYfGVBuddJkA9wIiNNl9y14L",
    "output": "Chunk ID: 548f98\nWall time: 0.0510 seconds\nProcess exited with code 0\nOriginal token count: 546\nOutput:\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client;\n\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClientException;\n\n/**\n * Internal REST client to check payment status in the payments-ticketing module.\n *\n * <p>Called by the PaymentTimeoutWatchdog to verify whether a cart has a confirmed\n * Stripe payment before releasing a timed-out seat lock.\n *\n * <p>Per PRODUCT.md Hard Rule #1: booking-inventory cannot import payments-ticketing\n * @Service / @Repository beans directly; inter-module calls must go via REST.\n */\n@Service\npublic class PaymentStatusClient {\n\n    private final RestClient restClient;\n\n    public PaymentStatusClient(\n        @Value(\"${app.internal-base-url:http://localhost:8080}\") String baseUrl\n    ) {\n        this.restClient = RestClient.builder().baseUrl(baseUrl).build();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Returns {@code true} if the cart has a confirmed payment in payments-ticketing.\n     *\n     * <p>Returns {@code false} on any error (connection refused, 404, etc.) so that\n     * the watchdog defaults to releasing the lock — correct because a confirmed payment\n     * would have already transitioned the seat to CONFIRMED state.\n     *\n     * @param cartId the booking-inventory cart ID.\n     * @return {@code true} if payment is confirmed; {@code false} otherwise.\n     */\n    public boolean isPaymentConfirmed(Long cartId) {\n        if (cartId == null) {\n            return false;\n        }\n        try {\n            PaymentStatusResponse response = restClient.get()\n                .uri(\"/internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}/status\", cartId)\n                .retrieve()\n                .body(PaymentStatusResponse.class);\n            return response != null && \"SUCCEEDED\".equalsIgnoreCase(response.status());\n        } catch (RestClientException ex) {\n            // payments-ticketing unavailable or cart has no payment record → safe to release\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // DTO for the internal endpoint response\n    public record PaymentStatusResponse(String status) {}\n}\n"
  }
}
```

inter-module calls must go via REST.\n */\n@Service\npublic class PaymentStatusClient {\n\n    private final RestClient restClient;\n\n    public PaymentStatusClient(\n        @Value(\"${app.internal-base-url:http://localhost:8080}\") String baseUrl\n    ) {\n        this.restClient = RestClient.builder().baseUrl(baseUrl).build();\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Returns {@code true} if the cart has a confirmed payment in payments-ticketing.\n     *\n     * <p>Returns {@code false} on any error (connection refused, 404, etc.) so that\n     * the watchdog defaults to releasing the lock — correct because a confirmed payment\n     * would have already transitioned the seat to CONFIRMED state.\n     *\n     * @param cartId the booking-inventory cart ID.\n     * @return {@code true} if payment is confirmed; {@code false} otherwise.\n     */\n    public boolean isPaymentConfirmed(Long cartId) {\n        if (cartId == null) {\n            return false;\n        }\n        try {\n            PaymentStatusResponse response = restClient.get()\n                .uri(\"/internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}/status\", cartId)\n                .retrieve()\n                .body(PaymentStatusResponse.class);\n            return response != null && \"SUCCEEDED\".equalsIgnoreCase(response.status());\n        } catch (RestClientException ex) {\n            // payments-ticketing unavailable or cart has no payment record → safe to release\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // DTO for the internal endpoint response\n    public record PaymentStatusResponse(String status) {}\n}\n"

}

com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Seat;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.SeatLockAuditLog;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.LockReleaseReason;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockState;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.CartItemRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatLockAuditLogRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.CartService;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.PaymentStatusClient;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis.SeatLockRedisService;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\nimport org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Scheduled;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n/**\n * Scheduled watchdog that releases HARD_LOCKED / PAYMENT_PENDING seat locks\n * whose TTL has expired without a confirmed Stripe payment.\n *\n * <p>Payment confirmation check delegates to {@link PaymentStatusClient} which\n * calls {@code GET /internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}/status} in payments-ticketing.\n * If the call fails (module not yet live, network issue), the default is {@code false}\n * — safe because confirmed payments always transition the seat to CONFIRMED state first.\n */\n@Slf4j\n@Component\npublic class PaymentTimeoutWatchdog {\n\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\n    private final CartItemRepository cartItemRepository;\n    private final SeatLockAuditLogRepository auditRepository;\n    private final SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService;\n    private final PaymentStatusClient paymentStatusClient;\n    private final CartService cartService;\n\n    public PaymentTimeoutWatchdog(\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\n        CartItemRepository cartItemRepository,\n        SeatLockAuditLogRepository auditRepository,\n        SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService,\n        PaymentStatusClient paymentStatusClient,\n        CartService cartService\n    ) {\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\n        this.cartItemRepository = cartItemRepository;\n        this.auditRepository = auditRepository;\n        this.seatLockRedisService = seatLockRedisService;\n        this.paymentStatusClient = paymentStatusClient;\n        this.cartService = cartService;\n    }\n\n    @Scheduled(fixedDelay = 60000)\n    @Transactional\n    public void releaseTimedOutPaymentLocks() {\n        List<Seat> candidates = seatRepository.findAll().stream()\n            .filter(seat -> (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED ||\n                seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.PAYMENT_PENDING)\n                && seat.getLockedUntil() != null\n                && seat.getLockedUntil().isBefore(Instant.now()))\n            .toList();\n\n        for (Seat seat : candidates) {\n            try {\n                if (isPaymentConfirmed(seat)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n                SeatLockState from = seat.getLockState();\n                Long userId = seat.getLockedByUserId();\n                seat.release(LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_TIMEOUT);\n                seatRepository.save(seat);\n                if (userId != null) {\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                }\n                auditRepository.save(new SeatLockAuditLog(\n                    seat.getId(),\n                    null,\n                    seat.getShowSlotId(),\n                    userId,\n                    from,\n                    SeatLockState.AVAILABLE,\n                    SeatLockEvent.RELEASE,\n                    LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_TIMEOUT.name(),\n                    null\n                ));\n                if (userId != null) {\n                    cartService.handlePaymentTimeout(null, List.of(seat.getId()), userId);\n                }\n            } catch (Exception ex) {\n                log.warn(\"Payment timeout watchdog skip seatId={} reason={}\", seat.getId(), ex.getMessage());\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Checks whether a confirmed payment exists for the cart that contains this seat.\n     * Uses PaymentStatusClient (REST call to payments-ticketing internal API).\n     */\n    private boolean isPaymentConfirmed(Seat seat) {\n        Long cartId = cartItemRepository.findFirstBySeatId(seat.getId())\n            .map(item -> item.getCart().getId())\n            .orElse(null);\n        return paymentStatusClient.isPaymentConfirmed(cartId);\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

.setAmount(request.amount())\n                .setCurrency(request.currency())\n                .setReceiptEmail(request.receiptEmail())\n                .setDescription(request.description())\n request.reason().toUpperCase()));\n            }\n\n            RequestOptions options = RequestOptions.builder()\n                .setIdempotencyKey(request.idempotencyKey())\n                .build();\n\n            Refund refund = Refund.create(builder.build(), options);\n            return toResponse(refund);\n        } catch (StripeException ex) {\n            throw new getRefund(String refundId) {\n        try {\n            Refund refund = Refund.retrieve(refundId);\n            return toResponse(refund);\n        } catch (StripeException ex) {\n            throw new com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.exception.StripeIntegrationException(\n                \"Failed to retrieve refund id=\" + refundId, ex);\n        }\n    }\n\n    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    private StripeRefundResponse toResponse(Refund refund) {\n        return new StripeRefundResponse(\n com.stripe.model.Event;\nimport com.stripe.net.Webhook;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\n\n/**\n * Parses and verifies incoming Stripe webhook payloads.\n *\n * <p>Hard Rule #2: all Stripe webhook handling goes through this facade.\n */\n@Component\npublic class StripeWebhookHandler {\n\n    private final StripeConfig stripeConfig;\n\n    public StripeWebhookHandler(StripeConfig stripeConfig) {\n        this.stripeConfig = stripeConfig;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Verifies the Stripe-Signature header and constructs a {@link StripeWebhookEvent}.\n     *\n     * @param payload       Raw HTTP request body as a string (must not be deserialized first).\n     * @param signatureHeader Value of the {@code Stripe-Signature} HTTP header.\n     * @return parsed and verified webhook event.\n     * @throws com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.exception.StripeWebhookSignatureException\n     *         if the signature is invalid or the payload is tampered.\n     */\n    public StripeWebhookEvent parse(String payload, String signatureHeader) {\n        try {\n            Event event = Webhook.constructEvent(\n                payload, signatureHeader, stripeConfig.getWebhookSecret());\n\n            String objectId = event.getDataObjectDeserializer()\n                .getObject()\n                .map(obj -> {\n                    try {\n                        java.lang.reflect.Method getId = obj.getClass().getMethod(\"getId\");\n                        return (String) getId.invoke(obj);\n                    } catch (Exception e) {\n                        return null;\n                    }\n                })\n                .orElse(null);\n\n            return new StripeWebhookEvent(\n                event.getId(),\n                event.getType(),\n                objectId,\n                payload\n            );\n        } catch (SignatureVerificationException ex) {\n            throw new com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.exception.StripeWebhookSignatureException(\n                \"Invalid Stripe webhook signature\", ex);\n        }\n    }\n}\n"

com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.CartService;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.AuthenticatedUser;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.Roles;\nimport jakarta.validation.Valid;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;\nimport org.springframework.security.core.Authentication;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\n\n@RestController\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/v1/booking/cart\")\npublic class CartController {\n\n    private final CartService cartService;\n\n    public CartController(CartService cartService) {\n        this.cartService = cartService;\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/add-seat\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n    public CartResponse addSeat(Authentication authentication, @Valid @RequestBody AddSeatRequest request) {\n        AuthenticatedUser user = (AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal();\n        return cartService.addSeat(user.userId(), user.orgId(), user.role(), request);\n    }\n\n    @DeleteMapping(\"/items/{itemId}\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n    public CartResponse removeItem(Authentication authentication, @PathVariable Long itemId) {\n        AuthenticatedUser user = (AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal();\n        return cartService.removeItem(user.userId(), itemId);\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{cartId}\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n    public CartResponse getCart(Authentication authentication, @PathVariable Long cartId) {\n        AuthenticatedUser user = (AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal();\n        return cartService.getCart(user.userId(), cartId);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/confirm\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n    public CartResponse confirm(Authentication authentication, @Valid @RequestBody ConfirmCartRequest request) {\n        AuthenticatedUser user = (AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal();\n        return cartService.confirm(user.userId(), user.orgId(), user.email(), request);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/abandon\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.USER + \"')\")\n    public Map<String, String> abandon(Authentication authentication, @Valid @RequestBody AbandonCartRequest request) {\n        AuthenticatedUser user = (AuthenticatedUser) authentication.getPrincipal();\n        cartService.abandon(user.userId(), request);\n        return Map.of(\"message\", \"Cart abandoned. All seat locks released.\");\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotCancelResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotPricingTierResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotRetryResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.api.dto.response.ShowSlotSubmitResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlot;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.ShowSlotOccurrence;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.domain.enums.ShowSlotStatus;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.mapper.ShowSlotMapper;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.ShowSlotService;\nimport com.eventplatform.scheduling.service.ShowSlotUpdateResult;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.PageResponse;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.security.Roles;\nimport jakarta.validation.Valid;\nimport java.time.ZonedDateTime;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\nimport org.springframework.format.annotation.DateTimeFormat;\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;\nimport org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;\nimport org.springframework.security.access.prepost.PreAuthorize;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ResponseStatus;\nimport org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;\n\n@RestController\n@RequestMapping(\"/api/v1/scheduling/slots\")\npublic class ShowSlotController {\n\n    private final ShowSlotService showSlotService;\n    private final ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper;\n\n    public ShowSlotController(ShowSlotService showSlotService, ShowSlotMapper showSlotMapper) {\n        this.showSlotService = showSlotService;\n        this.showSlotMapper = showSlotMapper;\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping\n    @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.CREATED)\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotResponse createSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @Valid @RequestBody CreateShowSlotRequest request\n    ) {\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.createSlot(organizationId, request);\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(slot);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/{id}/submit\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotSubmitResponse submitSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.submitSlot(organizationId, slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotSubmitResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), slot.getEbEventId(), slot.getSyncAttemptCount(), \"EB sync initiated\");\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{id}\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotResponse getSlot(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId) {\n        return showSlotMapper.toResponse(showSlotService.getSlot(slotId));\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listSlots(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"status\", required = false) ShowSlotStatus status,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"venueId\", required = false) Long venueId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"cityId\", required = false) Long cityId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"startAfter\", required = false) @DateTimeFormat(iso = DateTimeFormat.ISO.DATE_TIME) ZonedDateTime startAfter,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n    ) {\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listSlots(organizationId, status, venueId, cityId, startAfter, page, size);\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\n    }\n\n    @PutMapping(\"/{id}\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ResponseEntity<ShowSlotResponse> updateSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId,\n        @Valid @RequestBody UpdateShowSlotRequest request\n    ) {\n        ShowSlotUpdateResult result = showSlotService.updateSlot(organizationId, slotId, request);\n        ShowSlotResponse response = showSlotMapper.toResponse(result.slot());\n        if (result.ebSyncFailed()) {\n            return ResponseEntity.status(207).body(response);\n        }\n        return ResponseEntity.ok(response);\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/{id}/cancel\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotCancelResponse cancelSlot(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        boolean ebCancelled = showSlotService.cancelSlot(organizationId, slotId);\n        ShowSlot slot = showSlotService.getSlot(slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotCancelResponse(slot.getId(), slot.getStatus(), ebCancelled, \"Slot cancelled\");\n    }\n\n    @PostMapping(\"/{id}/retry-sync\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotRetryResponse retrySync(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId\n    ) {\n        showSlotService.retrySync(organizationId, slotId);\n        return new ShowSlotRetryResponse(ShowSlotStatus.PENDING_SYNC, \"Retry initiated\");\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{id}/pricing-tiers\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"isAuthenticated()\")\n    public List<ShowSlotPricingTierResponse> getPricingTiers(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId) {\n        return showSlotService.getPricingTiers(slotId)\n            .stream()\n            .map(showSlotMapper::toPricingTierResponse)\n            .toList();\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/{id}/occurrences\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse listOccurrences(@PathVariable(\"id\") Long slotId) {\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrence> occurrences = showSlotService.listOccurrences(slotId);\n        List<ShowSlotOccurrenceResponse> responseList = occurrences.stream()\n            .map(showSlotMapper::toOccurrenceResponse)\n            .toList();\n        return new ShowSlotOccurrenceListResponse(slotId, responseList);\n    }\n\n    @GetMapping(\"/mismatches\")\n    @PreAuthorize(\"hasRole('\" + Roles.ADMIN + \"')\")\n    public PageResponse<ShowSlotResponse> listMismatches(\n        @RequestParam(\"orgId\") Long organizationId,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"page\", defaultValue = \"0\") int page,\n        @RequestParam(name = \"size\", defaultValue = \"20\") int size\n    ) {\n        Page<ShowSlot> slots = showSlotService.listMismatches(organizationId, page, size);\n        List<ShowSlotResponse> responses = slots.map(showSlotMapper::toResponse).getContent();\n        return new PageResponse<>(responses, slots.getTotalElements(), page, size);\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}

com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Payment;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.PaymentRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;\nimport org.springframework.boot.test.autoconfigure.web.servlet.WebMvcTest;\nimport org.springframework.boot.test.context.TestConfiguration;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;\nimport org.springframework.context.annotation.Import;\nimport org.springframework.test.context.ContextConfiguration;\nimport org.springframework.test.util.ReflectionTestUtils;\nimport org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc;\n\n@WebMvcTest(InternalPaymentController.class)\n@ContextConfiguration(classes = com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.PaymentsTicketingTestApplication.class)\n@Import({GlobalExceptionHandler.class, SecurityConfig.class, InternalPaymentControllerTest.MockBeans.class})\nclass InternalPaymentControllerTest {\n\n    @TestConfiguration\n    static class MockBeans {\n        @Bean\n        BookingRepository bookingRepository() {\n            return mock(BookingRepository.class);\n        }\n\n        @Bean\n        PaymentRepository paymentRepository() {\n            return mock(PaymentRepository.class);\n        }\n\n        @Bean\n        JwtTokenProvider jwtTokenProvider() {\n            return mock(JwtTokenProvider.class);\n        }\n\n        @Bean\n        JwtAuthenticationFilter jwtAuthenticationFilter(JwtTokenProvider jwtTokenProvider) {\n            return new JwtAuthenticationFilter(jwtTokenProvider);\n        }\n    }\n\n    @Autowired\n    private MockMvc mockMvc;\n\n    @Autowired\n    private BookingRepository bookingRepository;\n\n    @Autowired\n    private PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\n\n    @Test\n    void should_return_payment_status_SUCCEEDED_when_payment_confirmed() throws Exception {\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\"B-001\", 100L, 1L, 10L, 20L, 50000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 50L);\n\n        Payment payment = new Payment(50L, \"pi_test_abc\", 50000L, \"inr\");\n        payment.markSucceeded(\"ch_test_abc\");\n\n        when(bookingRepository.findByCartId(100L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n        when(paymentRepository.findByBookingId(50L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\n\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\"/internal/payments/by-cart/100/status\"))\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\"$.status\").value(\"SUCCEEDED\"));\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_return_404_when_no_booking_found_for_cart() throws Exception {\n        when(bookingRepository.findByCartId(999L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\n\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\"/internal/payments/by-cart/999/status\"))\n            .andExpect(status().isNotFound());\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_return_404_when_booking_exists_but_no_payment() throws Exception {\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\"B-002\", 200L, 2L, 11L, 21L, 30000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 60L);\n\n        when(bookingRepository.findByCartId(200L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n        when(paymentRepository.findByBookingId(60L)).thenReturn(Optional.empty());\n\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\"/internal/payments/by-cart/200/status\"))\n            .andExpect(status().isNotFound());\n    }\n\n    @Test\n    void should_return_PENDING_status_when_payment_not_yet_confirmed() throws Exception {\n        Booking booking = new Booking(\"B-003\", 300L, 3L, 12L, 22L, 40000L, \"inr\");\n        ReflectionTestUtils.setField(booking, \"id\", 70L);\n\n        Payment payment = new Payment(70L, \"pi_pending_xyz\", 40000L, \"inr\");\n\n        when(bookingRepository.findByCartId(300L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(booking));\n        when(paymentRepository.findByBookingId(70L)).thenReturn(Optional.of(payment));\n\n        mockMvc.perform(get(\"/internal/payments/by-cart/300/status\"))\n            .andExpect(status().isOk())\n            .andExpect(jsonPath(\"$.status\").value(\"PENDING\"));\n    }\n}\n"
  }

private static final Duration SOFT_LOCK_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(5);\n    private static final Duration HARD_LOCK_TTL = Duration.ofMinutes(30);\n\n    private final CartRepository cartRepository;\n    private final CartItemRepository cartItemRepository;\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\n    private final GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository;\n    private final GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService;\n    private final CartPricingService cartPricingService;\n    private final ConflictResolutionService conflictResolutionService;\n    private final CartMapper cartMapper;\n    private final EbTicketService ebTicketService;\n    private final EbTokenStore ebTokenStore;\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher;\n    private final StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate;\n\n    public CartService(\n        CartRepository cartRepository,\n        CartItemRepository cartItemRepository,\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\n        GaInventoryClaimRepository gaInventoryClaimRepository,\n        SeatLockAuditLogRepository seatLockAuditLogRepository,\n        SlotValidationService slotValidationService,\n        SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService,\n        GaInventoryRedisService gaInventoryRedisService,\n        CartPricingService cartPricingService,\n        ConflictResolutionService conflictResolutionService,\n        CartMapper cartMapper,\n        EbTicketService ebTicketService,\n        EbTokenStore ebTokenStore,\n        ApplicationEventPublisher eventPublisher,\n        StringRedisTemplate stringRedisTemplate\n    ) {\n        this.cartRepository = cartRepository;\n        this.cartItemRepository = cartItemRepository;\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\n        this.gaInventoryClaimRepository = gaInventoryClaimRepository;\n        this.seatLockAuditLogRepository = seatLockAuditLogRepository;\n        this.slotValidationService = slotValidationService;\n        this.seatLockRedisService = seatLockRedisService;\n        this.gaInventoryRedisService = gaInventoryRedisService;\n        this.cartPricingService = cartPricingService;\n        this.conflictResolutionService = conflictResolutionService;\n        this.cartMapper = cartMapper;\n        this.ebTicketService = ebTicketService;\n        this.ebTokenStore = ebTokenStore;\n        this.eventPublisher = eventPublisher;\n        this.stringRedisTemplate = stringRedisTemplate;\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse addSeat(Long userId, Long orgId, String role, AddSeatRequest request) {\n        slotValidationService.ensureUserActive(role);\n        SlotSummaryDto slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(request.slotId());\n        List<PricingTierDto> tiers = cartPricingService.getSlotPricingCached(request.slotId());\n        Map<Long, PricingTierDto> tierById = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(PricingTierDto::tierId, Function.identity()));\n\n        PricingTierDto tier = tierById.get(request.tierId());\n        if (tier == null) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Pricing tier not found for slot\", \"TIER_NOT_FOUND\");\n        }\n        slotValidationService.ensureTierSynced(request.tierId(), tier.ebTicketClassId());\n        assertOrgConnected(orgId);\n\n        Cart cart = getOrCreatePendingCart(userId, slot, orgId, tier.price().currency());\n\n        if (slot.seatingMode() == com.eventplatform.shared.common.enums.SeatingMode.RESERVED) {\n            if (request.seatId() == null) {\n                throw new BusinessRuleException(\"seatId is required for RESERVED mode\", \"SEAT_ID_REQUIRED\");\n            }\n            addReservedSeat(userId, cart, tierById, request, tier);\n        } else {\n            addGaTier(userId, cart, request, tier);\n        }\n\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse removeItem(Long userId, Long itemId) {\n        CartItem item = cartItemRepository.findByIdAndCartUserId(itemId, userId)\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new CartItemNotFoundException(itemId));\n\n        Cart cart = item.getCart();\n        if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n            Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId())\n                .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat not found\", \"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n            if (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED\n                || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.PAYMENT_PENDING\n                || seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.CONFIRMED) {\n                throw new BaseException(\"Seat removal not allowed\", \"SEAT_REMOVAL_NOT_ALLOWED\", HttpStatus.CONFLICT,\n                    Map.of(\"lockState\", seat.getLockState().name())) {\n                };\n            }\n            SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n            seat.release(LockReleaseReason.USER_REMOVED);\n            seatRepository.save(seat);\n            seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n            writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.AVAILABLE, SeatLockEvent.RELEASE, LockReleaseReason.USER_REMOVED.name(), null);\n        } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n            gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                gaInventoryRedisService.restore(claim.getShowSlotId(), claim.getPricingTierId(), claim.getQuantity());\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.delete(claim);\n            });\n        }\n\n        cart.removeItem(item);\n        cartItemRepository.delete(item);\n\n        Map<Long, PricingTierDto> tierById = fetchTierMap(cart.getShowSlotId());\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, tierById);\n    }\n\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\n    public CartResponse getCart(Long userId, Long cartId) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(cartId));\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(cartId);\n        }\n        return buildCartResponse(cart, fetchTierMap(cart.getShowSlotId()));\n    }\n\n    @Transactional\n    public CartResponse confirm(Long userId, Long orgId, String userEmail, ConfirmCartRequest request) {\n        Cart cart = cartRepository.findById(request.cartId()).orElseThrow(() -> new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId()));\n        if (!Objects.equals(cart.getUserId(), userId)) {\n            throw new CartNotFoundException(request.cartId());\n        }\n        cart.ensurePending();\n        if (cart.isExpired(Instant.now())) {\n            throw new CartExpiredException(cart.getId(), cart.getExpiresAt());\n        }\n\n        List<PricingTierDto> tiers = cartPricingService.getSlotPricingCached(cart.getShowSlotId());\n        Map<Long, PricingTierDto> tierById = tiers.stream().collect(Collectors.toMap(PricingTierDto::tierId, Function.identity()));\n        SlotSummaryDto slot = slotValidationService.requireActiveAndSynced(cart.getShowSlotId());\n\n        Set<Long> expiredSeatIds = cart.getItems().stream()\n            .map(CartItem::getSeatId)\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\n            .filter(seatId -> !seatLockRedisService.isOwnedBy(seatId, userId))\n            .collect(Collectors.toSet());\n        if (!expiredSeatIds.isEmpty()) {\n            throw new SoftLockExpiredException(expiredSeatIds);\n        }\n\n        Map<String, Long> ticketClassToTier = tierById.values().stream()\n            .filter(t -> t.ebTicketClassId() != null)\n            .collect(Collectors.toMap(PricingTierDto::ebTicketClassId, PricingTierDto::tierId, (a, b) -> a));\n\n        for (String ticketClassId : cart.getItems().stream().map(CartItem::getEbTicketClassId).collect(Collectors.toSet())) {\n            EbTicketClassResponse ticketClass;\n            try {\n                ticketClass = ebTicketService.getTicketClass(slot.ebEventId(), ticketClassId);\n            } catch (EbIntegrationException ex) {\n                throw new BaseException(\"Eventbrite unavailable\", \"EB_UNAVAILABLE\", HttpStatus.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,\n                    Map.of(\"retryAfterSeconds\", 10)) {\n                };\n            }\n            if (ticketClass != null && \"SOLD_OUT\".equalsIgnoreCase(ticketClass.onSaleStatus())) {\n                Long soldOutTierId = ticketClassToTier.get(ticketClassId);\n                releaseTierLocks(cart, userId, soldOutTierId);\n                List<Map<String, Object>> alternativeTiers = tierById.values().stream()\n                    .filter(t -> !Objects.equals(t.tierId(), soldOutTierId))\n                    .map(t -> Map.<String, Object>of(\"tierId\", t.tierId(), \"tierName\", t.tierName()))\n                    .toList();\n                throw new TierSoldOutException(soldOutTierId, Map.of(\"otherTiers\", alternativeTiers));\n            }\n        }\n\n        for (CartItem item : cart.getItems()) {\n            if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\n                Seat seat = seatRepository.findByIdWithLock(item.getSeatId())\n                    .orElseThrow(() -> new BusinessRuleException(\"Seat not found\", \"SEAT_NOT_FOUND\"));\n                try {\n                    if (!seatLockRedisService.extend(seat.getId(), userId, HARD_LOCK_TTL)) {\n                        throw new HardLockException(\"Failed to extend Redis lock for seat=\" + seat.getId());\n                    }\n                    SeatLockState previous = seat.getLockState();\n                    seat.hardLock(HARD_LOCK_TTL);\n                    seatRepository.save(seat);\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM, null, null);\n                } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                    throw ex;\n                }\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                    claim.hardLock(Instant.now().plus(HARD_LOCK_TTL));\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.save(claim);\n"
  }
}

seatRepository.save(seat);\n                    writeAudit(seat, userId, previous, SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED, SeatLockEvent.CONFIRM, null, null);\n                } catch (RuntimeException ex) {\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                    throw ex;\n                }\n            } else if (item.getGaClaimId() != null) {\n                gaInventoryClaimRepository.findById(item.getGaClaimId()).ifPresent(claim -> {\n                    claim.hardLock(Instant.now().plus(HARD_LOCK_TTL));\n                    gaInventoryClaimRepository.save(claim);\n"
  }
}
```

    if (status == ShowSlotStatus.CANCELLED) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"Slot already cancelled\", \"SLOT_ALREADY_CANCELLED\");\n        }\n        if (status == ShowSlotStatus.DRAFT) {\n            throw new BusinessRuleException(\"DRAFT slots must be deleted, not cancelled\", \"SLOT_DRAFT_CANCEL\");\n        }\n        markCancelled();\n    }\n\n    public void markPendingSync() {\n"
  }
}
```

## Entry 307
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T17:26:39.580Z
**Role/Type:** event_msg
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T17:26:39.580Z",
  "type": "event_msg",
  "payload": {
    "type": "agent_message",
    "message": "I’ve mapped the current gap: `payments-ticketing` only has a scaffold, so FR5 requires full implementation across domain, repositories, services, controllers, listeners, and one DB migration plus small integration touchpoints in `booking-inventory` and `shared/stripe`.  \n\nImplementation plan:\n1. Add/align domain model and enums in `payments-ticketing` for `BookingItem`, `ETicket`, `Refund`, `CancellationRequest`, and transition methods on `Booking`/`Payment`.\n2. Add repositories, module exceptions, DTOs, and MapStruct mappers.\n3. Implement services:\n   - `PaymentService` (checkout creation, confirm, failure handling, webhook-safe confirm path)\n   - `BookingService` (history/detail reads)\n   - `ETicketService` (ticket reads)\n   - `CancellationService` + `RefundService` (refund flow + finalization)\n4. Add event listeners/controllers:\n   - payment, booking, e-ticket, webhook, and internal payment status APIs\n   - extend internal endpoint to `/api/v1/internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}` with `{confirmed}` response\n5. Add migration `V32` (`e_tickets` default + unique constraint), add cancellation fee config in `application.yaml`.\n6. Wire cross-module and ACL adjustments:\n   - add internal cart-items endpoint in `booking-inventory` for `payments-ticketing` cart snapshot fetch\n   - update `shared/stripe` PaymentIntent request/service to support metadata\n   - update `PaymentStatusClient` to use the new internal response shape/path\n7. Run module tests/compile and fix breakages.",
    "phase": "commentary"
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**

this.status = BookingStatus.PENDING;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void confirm(String stripePaymentIntentId, String stripeChargeId) {\\n        if (status != BookingStatus.PENDING) {\\n            throw this.status = CancellationRequestStatus.APPROVED;\\n        this.resolvedAt = Instant.now();\\n    }\\n\\n    public void reject() {\\n        this.status = CancellationRequestStatus.REJECTED;\\n        this.resolvedAt = Instant.now();\\n    }\\n\\n    public Long getId() {\\n        return id;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Long getBookingId() {\\n        return bookingId;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Long getUserId() {\\n        return userId;\\n    }\\n\\n    public RefundReason getReason() {\\n        return reason;\\n    }\\n\\n    public CancellationRequestStatus getStatus() {\\n        return status;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Instant getRequestedAt() {\\n        return requestedAt;\\n    }\\n\\n    public Instant getResolvedAt() {\\n        return resolvedAt;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_hYkonMPRO3ilHm8WM4PncDwN"
  }
}

## Entry 368
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T17:29:56.279Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T17:29:56.279Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/AfterCommitEventPublisher.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport org.springframework.context.ApplicationEventPublisher;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.support.TransactionSynchronization;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.support.TransactionSynchronizationManager;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class AfterCommitEventPublisher {\\n\\n    private final ApplicationEventPublisher applicationEventPublisher;\\n\\n    public AfterCommitEventPublisher(ApplicationEventPublisher applicationEventPublisher) {\\n        this.applicationEventPublisher = applicationEventPublisher;\\n    }\\n\\n    public void publish(Object event) {\\n        if (TransactionSynchronizationManager.isActualTransactionActive()) {\\n            TransactionSynchronizationManager.registerSynchronization(new TransactionSynchronization() {\\n                @Override\\n                public void afterCommit() {\\n                    applicationEventPublisher.publishEvent(event);\\n                }\\n            });\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        applicationEventPublisher.publishEvent(event);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/BookingRefGenerator.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport java.time.Clock;\\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\\nimport java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter;\\nimport java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicLong;\\nimport org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Scheduled;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\\n\\n@Component\\npublic class BookingRefGenerator {\\n\\n    private static final DateTimeFormatter DATE_FORMATTER = DateTimeFormatter.BASIC_ISO_DATE;\\n\\n    private final AtomicLong dailySequence = new AtomicLong(0);\\n    private final Clock clock = Clock.systemUTC();\\n\\n    public String nextRef() {\\n        long next = dailySequence.incrementAndGet();\\n        return \\\"BK-\\\" + LocalDate.now(clock).format(DATE_FORMATTER) + \\\"-\\\" + String.format(\\\"%03d\\\", next);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Scheduled(cron = \\\"0 0 0 * * *\\\", zone = \\\"UTC\\\")\\n    void resetCounter() {\\n        dailySequence.set(0);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_chGUpUcGpZiQcuvv4NO75ADV"
  }
}
```

## Entry 375
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T17:30:52.758Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T17:30:52.758Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/PaymentService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.BookingItemResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.BookingResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.CheckoutInitResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.ETicketResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.BookingItem;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.ETicket;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Payment;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.PaymentStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.BookingNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.CartItemsFetchException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.PaymentIntentNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.PaymentNotConfirmedException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.mapper.BookingMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.mapper.ETicketMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingItemRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.ETicketRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.PaymentRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.BookingConfirmedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.CartAssembledEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.PaymentFailedEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.SlotSummaryReader;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripePaymentIntentRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripePaymentIntentResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.service.StripePaymentService;\\nimport java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;\\nimport java.util.ArrayList;\\nimport java.util.Base64;\\nimport java.util.HashMap;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport java.util.Objects;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.core.ParameterizedTypeReference;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatusCode;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class PaymentService {\\n\\n    private final BookingRepository bookingRepository;\\n    private final PaymentRepository paymentRepository;\\n    private final BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository;\\n    private final ETicketRepository eTicketRepository;\\n    private final StripePaymentService stripePaymentService;\\n    private final BookingMapper bookingMapper;\\n    private final ETicketMapper eTicketMapper;\\n    private final AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher;\\n    private final BookingRefGenerator bookingRefGenerator;\\n    private final SlotSummaryReader slotSummaryReader;\\n    private final RestClient restClient;\\n\\n    public PaymentService(\\n        BookingRepository bookingRepository,\\n        PaymentRepository paymentRepository,\\n        BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository,\\n        ETicketRepository eTicketRepository,\\n        StripePaymentService stripePaymentService,\\n        BookingMapper bookingMapper,\\n        ETicketMapper eTicketMapper,\\n        AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher,\\n        BookingRefGenerator bookingRefGenerator,\\n        SlotSummaryReader slotSummaryReader,\\n        @Value(\\\"${app.internal-base-url:http://localhost:8080}\\\") String internalBaseUrl\\n    ) {\\n        this.bookingRepository = bookingRepository;\\n        this.paymentRepository = paymentRepository;\\n        this.bookingItemRepository = bookingItemRepository;\\n        this.eTicketRepository = eTicketRepository;\\n        this.stripePaymentService = stripePaymentService;\\n        this.bookingMapper = bookingMapper;\\n        this.eTicketMapper = eTicketMapper;\\n        this.afterCommitEventPublisher = afterCommitEventPublisher;\\n        this.bookingRefGenerator = bookingRefGenerator;\\n        this.slotSummaryReader = slotSummaryReader;\\n        this.restClient = RestClient.builder().baseUrl(internalBaseUrl).build();\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public CheckoutInitResponse createCheckout(CartAssembledEvent event) {\\n        Booking existingBooking = bookingRepository.findByCartId(event.cartId()).orElse(null);\\n        if (existingBooking != null) {\\n            Payment existingPayment = paymentRepository.findByBookingId(existingBooking.getId()).orElse(null);\\n            if (existingPayment != null && (existingPayment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.PENDING || existingPayment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.SUCCESS)) {\\n                StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(existingPayment.getStripePaymentIntentId());\\n                return new CheckoutInitResponse(\\n                    event.cartId(),\\n                    existingBooking.getBookingRef(),\\n                    existingPayment.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\\n                    paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\\n                    existingPayment.getAmount(),\\n                    existingPayment.getCurrency()\\n                );\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        String bookingRef = bookingRefGenerator.nextRef();\\n        Long eventId = event.slotId();\\n        if (slotSummaryReader.getSlotSummary(event.slotId()) == null) {\\n            throw new CartItemsFetchException(\\\"Unable to resolve slot details for cart=\\\" + event.cartId());\\n        }\\n\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.save(new Booking(\\n            bookingRef,\\n            event.cartId(),\\n            event.userId(),\\n            eventId,\\n            event.slotId(),\\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\\n            event.currency()\\n        ));\\n\\n        StripePaymentIntentRequest request = new StripePaymentIntentRequest(\\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\\n            event.currency(),\\n            event.userEmail(),\\n            \\\"Booking \\\" + bookingRef,\\n            \\\"cart-\\\" + event.cartId(),\\n            Map.of(\\n                \\\"booking_ref\\\", bookingRef,\\n                \\\"user_id\\\", String.valueOf(event.userId())\\n            )\\n        );\\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.createPaymentIntent(request);\\n\\n        Payment payment = new Payment(\\n            booking.getId(),\\n            paymentIntent.paymentIntentId(),\\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\\n            event.currency()\\n        );\\n        paymentRepository.save(payment);\\n\\n        return new CheckoutInitResponse(\\n            event.cartId(),\\n            bookingRef,\\n            paymentIntent.paymentIntentId(),\\n            paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\\n            event.totalAmountInSmallestUnit(),\\n            event.currency()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public CheckoutInitResponse getCheckout(Long cartId, Long userId) {\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByCartId(cartId).orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(\\\"cart-\\\" + cartId));\\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(booking.getBookingRef());\\n        }\\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId())\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(\\\"cart-\\\" + cartId));\\n\\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse paymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(payment.getStripePaymentIntentId());\\n        return new CheckoutInitResponse(\\n            cartId,\\n            booking.getBookingRef(),\\n            payment.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\\n            paymentIntent.clientSecret(),\\n            payment.getAmount(),\\n            payment.getCurrency()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public BookingResponse confirmPayment(Long userId, String paymentIntentId) {\\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\\n\\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(booking.getBookingRef());\\n        }\\n\\n        if (payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.SUCCESS && booking.getStatus() == BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\\n            return buildBookingResponse(booking);\\n        }\\n\\n        StripePaymentIntentResponse stripePaymentIntent = stripePaymentService.getPaymentIntent(paymentIntentId);\\n        if (!\\\"succeeded\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripePaymentIntent.status())) {\\n            throw new PaymentNotConfirmedException(stripePaymentIntent.status());\\n        }\\n\\n        payment.markSuccess(stripePaymentIntent.latestCharge());\\n        booking.confirm(paymentIntentId, stripePaymentIntent.latestCharge());\\n\\n        List<CartItemSnapshot> cartItems = fetchCartItems(booking.getCartId());\\n        if (cartItems.isEmpty()) {\\n            throw new CartItemsFetchException(\\\"No cart items found for cart=\\\" + booking.getCartId());\\n        }\\n\\n        List<Long> seatIds = new ArrayList<>();\\n        for (CartItemSnapshot cartItem : cartItems) {\\n            int quantity = cartItem.quantity() == null || cartItem.quantity() < 1 ? 1 : cartItem.quantity();\\n            for (int i = 0; i < quantity; i++) {\\n                BookingItem item = bookingItemRepository.save(new BookingItem(\\n                    booking.getId(),\\n                    cartItem.seatId(),\\n                    cartItem.gaClaimId(),\\n                    cartItem.ticketClassId(),\\n                    cartItem.unitPrice(),\\n                    cartItem.currency()\\n                ));\\n\\n                String rawQrData = booking.getBookingRef() + \\\":\\\" + item.getId();\\n                String encodedQrData = Base64.getEncoder().encodeToString(rawQrData.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));\\n                ETicket eTicket = new ETicket(\\n                    booking.getId(),\\n                    item.getId(),\\n                    encodedQrData,\\n                    \\\"/tickets/\\\" + booking.getBookingRef() + \\\"/\\\" + item.getId() + \\\".pdf\\\"\\n                );\\n                eTicketRepository.save(eTicket);\\n\\n                if (item.getSeatId() != null) {\\n                    seatIds.add(item.getSeatId());\\n                }\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingConfirmedEvent(\\n            booking.getCartId(),\\n            seatIds,\\n            paymentIntentId,\\n            booking.getUserId()\\n        ));\\n\\n        return buildBookingResponse(booking);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public BookingResponse confirmPaymentFromWebhook(String paymentIntentId) {\\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\\n        return confirmPayment(booking.getUserId(), paymentIntentId);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void handleFailure(String paymentIntentId, String failureCode, String failureMessage) {\\n        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByStripePaymentIntentId(paymentIntentId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentIntentNotFoundException(paymentIntentId));\\n\\n        if (payment.getStatus() == PaymentStatus.FAILED) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(payment.getBookingId())\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(payment.getBookingId()));\\n\\n        payment.markFailed(failureCode, failureMessage);\\n        if (booking.getStatus() != BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\\n            booking.markCancellationPending();\\n            booking.cancel();\\n        }\\n\\n        List<Long> seatIds = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId())\\n            .stream()\\n            .map(BookingItem::getSeatId)\\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new PaymentFailedEvent(booking.getCartId(), seatIds, booking.getUserId()));\\n    }\\n\\n    private BookingResponse buildBookingResponse(Booking booking) {\\n        BookingResponse response = bookingMapper.toResponse(booking);\\n\\n        Map<Long, ETicket> ticketsByBookingItemId = eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId()).stream()\\n            .collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toMap(ETicket::getBookingItemId, ticket -> ticket, (a, b) -> a, HashMap::new));\\n\\n        List<BookingItemResponse> items = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId()).stream()\\n            .map(item -> {\\n                ETicket ticket = ticketsByBookingItemId.get(item.getId());\\n                ETicketResponse mappedTicket = ticket == null ? null : withTicketCode(eTicketMapper.toResponse(ticket), booking.getBookingRef(), item.getId());\\n                return new BookingItemResponse(\\n                    item.getId(),\\n                    item.getSeatId(),\\n                    item.getGaClaimId(),\\n                    item.getTicketClassId(),\\n                    item.getUnitPrice(),\\n                    item.getCurrency(),\\n                    item.getStatus(),\\n                    mappedTicket\\n                );\\n            })\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        return new BookingResponse(\\n            response.bookingRef(),\\n            response.status(),\\n            response.slotId(),\\n            response.totalAmount(),\\n            response.currency(),\\n            response.stripePaymentIntentId(),\\n            items,\\n            response.createdAt()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    private ETicketResponse withTicketCode(ETicketResponse rawResponse, String bookingRef, Long bookingItemId) {\\n        return new ETicketResponse(\\n            bookingRef + \\\":\\\" + bookingItemId,\\n            bookingItemId,\\n            rawResponse.qrCodeData(),\\n            rawResponse.pdfUrl(),\\n            rawResponse.status()\\n        );\\n    }\\n\\n    private List<CartItemSnapshot> fetchCartItems(Long cartId) {\\n        List<CartItemSnapshot> items = restClient.get()\\n            .uri(\\\"/internal/booking/carts/{cartId}/items\\\", cartId)\\n            .retrieve()\\n            .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (request, response) -> {\\n                throw new CartItemsFetchException(\\\"Unable to fetch cart items for cart=\\\" + cartId + \\\" status=\\\" + response.getStatusCode());\\n            })\\n            .body(new ParameterizedTypeReference<>() {\\n            });\\n\\n        return items == null ? List.of() : items;\\n    }\\n\\n    public record CartItemSnapshot(\\n        Long itemId,\\n        Long seatId,\\n        Long gaClaimId,\\n        String ticketClassId,\\n        Long unitPrice,\\n        String currency,\\n        Integer quantity\\n    ) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

## Entry 380
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T17:31:09.162Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T17:31:09.162Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/BookingService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.BookingResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.BookingSummaryResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.BookingNotFoundException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.mapper.BookingMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class BookingService {\\n\\n    private final BookingRepository bookingRepository;\\n    private final PaymentService paymentService;\\n    private final BookingMapper bookingMapper;\\n\\n    public BookingService(BookingRepository bookingRepository, PaymentService paymentService, BookingMapper bookingMapper) {\\n        this.bookingRepository = bookingRepository;\\n        this.paymentService = paymentService;\\n        this.bookingMapper = bookingMapper;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public Page<BookingSummaryResponse> listBookings(Long userId, Pageable pageable) {\\n        return bookingRepository.findByUserIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc(userId, pageable)\\n            .map(bookingMapper::toSummaryResponse);\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public BookingResponse getBooking(Long userId, String bookingRef) {\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(bookingRef)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef));\\n        if (!booking.getUserId().equals(userId)) {\\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef);\\n        }\\n\\n        return paymentService.confirmPayment(booking.getUserId(), booking.getStripePaymentIntentId());\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public Booking getOwnedBooking(Long userId, String bookingRef) {\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(bookingRef)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef));\\n        if (!booking.getUserId().equals(userId)) {\\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef);\\n        }\\n        return booking;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/ETicketService.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.ETicketResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.api.dto.response.TicketsByBookingResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.Booking;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.mapper.ETicketMapper;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.ETicketRepository;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class ETicketService {\\n\\n    private final BookingService bookingService;\\n    private final ETicketRepository eTicketRepository;\\n    private final ETicketMapper eTicketMapper;\\n\\n    public ETicketService(BookingService bookingService, ETicketRepository eTicketRepository, ETicketMapper eTicketMapper) {\\n        this.bookingService = bookingService;\\n        this.eTicketRepository = eTicketRepository;\\n        this.eTicketMapper = eTicketMapper;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public TicketsByBookingResponse getTickets(Long userId, String bookingRef) {\\n        Booking booking = bookingService.getOwnedBooking(userId, bookingRef);\\n\\n        List<ETicketResponse> tickets = eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(booking.getId()).stream()\\n            .map(ticket -> {\\n                ETicketResponse raw = eTicketMapper.toResponse(ticket);\\n                return new ETicketResponse(\\n                    booking.getBookingRef() + \\\":\\\" + ticket.getBookingItemId(),\\n                    ticket.getBookingItemId(),\\n                    raw.qrCodeData(),\\n                    raw.pdfUrl(),\\n                    raw.status()\\n                );\\n            })\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        return new TicketsByBookingResponse(bookingRef, tickets);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_AkyDFHLMIeVINoxPn0hMWWYi"
  }
}

com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.exception.RefundFailedException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingItemRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.CancellationRequestRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.ETicketRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.RefundRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.event.published.BookingCancelledEvent;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripeRefundRequest;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripeRefundResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.exception.StripeIntegrationException;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.service.StripeRefundService;\\nimport java.time.Instant;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport java.util.Map;\\nimport java.util.Objects;\\nimport org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;\\nimport org.springframework.core.ParameterizedTypeReference;\\nimport org.springframework.http.HttpStatusCode;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\nimport org.springframework.web.client.RestClient;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class CancellationService {\\n\\n    private final BookingRepository bookingRepository;\\n    private final BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository;\\n    private final ETicketRepository eTicketRepository;\\n    private final RefundRepository refundRepository;\\n    private final CancellationRequestRepository cancellationRequestRepository;\\n    private final StripeRefundService stripeRefundService;\\n    private final AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher;\\n    private final RestClient restClient;\\n    private final int cancellationWindowHours;\\n    private final int feePercent;\\n\\n    public CancellationService(\\n        BookingRepository bookingRepository,\\n        BookingItemRepository bookingItemRepository,\\n        ETicketRepository eTicketRepository,\\n        RefundRepository refundRepository,\\n        CancellationRequestRepository cancellationRequestRepository,\\n        StripeRefundService stripeRefundService,\\n        AfterCommitEventPublisher afterCommitEventPublisher,\\n        @Value(\\\"${app.internal-base-url:http://localhost:8080}\\\") String internalBaseUrl,\\n        @Value(\\\"${payments.cancellation.window-hours:24}\\\") int cancellationWindowHours,\\n        @Value(\\\"${payments.cancellation.fee-percent:0}\\\") int feePercent\\n    ) {\\n        this.bookingRepository = bookingRepository;\\n        this.bookingItemRepository = bookingItemRepository;\\n        this.eTicketRepository = eTicketRepository;\\n        this.refundRepository = refundRepository;\\n        this.cancellationRequestRepository = cancellationRequestRepository;\\n        this.stripeRefundService = stripeRefundService;\\n        this.afterCommitEventPublisher = afterCommitEventPublisher;\\n        this.restClient = RestClient.builder().baseUrl(internalBaseUrl).build();\\n        this.cancellationWindowHours = cancellationWindowHours;\\n        this.feePercent = feePercent;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public CancellationResponse cancel(Long userId, String bookingRef, RefundReason reason) {\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findByBookingRef(bookingRef)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef));\\n\\n        if (!Objects.equals(booking.getUserId(), userId)) {\\n            throw new BookingNotFoundException(bookingRef);\\n        }\\n        if (booking.getStatus() != BookingStatus.CONFIRMED) {\\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\\\"Booking is not in CONFIRMED state\\\", Map.of(\\\"currentStatus\\\", booking.getStatus().name()));\\n        }\\n\\n        SlotTimingResponse slotTiming = fetchSlotTiming(booking.getSlotId());\\n        Instant windowClosedAt = slotTiming.startTime().minusSeconds(cancellationWindowHours * 3600L);\\n        if (!Instant.now().isBefore(windowClosedAt)) {\\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\\n                \\\"Cancellation window has closed\\\",\\n                Map.of(\\\"windowClosedAt\\\", windowClosedAt.toString())\\n            );\\n        }\\n\\n        CancellationRequest cancellationRequest = new CancellationRequest(booking.getId(), userId, reason);\\n        cancellationRequestRepository.save(cancellationRequest);\\n        booking.markCancellationPending();\\n\\n        long refundAmount = booking.getTotalAmount() - ((booking.getTotalAmount() * feePercent) / 100);\\n\\n        try {\\n            StripeRefundResponse stripeRefund = stripeRefundService.createRefund(new StripeRefundRequest(\\n                booking.getStripePaymentIntentId(),\\n                refundAmount,\\n                reason.name().toLowerCase(),\\n                \\\"refund-\\\" + booking.getBookingRef()\\n            ));\\n\\n            RefundStatus refundStatus = toRefundStatus(stripeRefund.status());\\n            Refund refund = refundRepository.save(new Refund(\\n                booking.getId(),\\n                stripeRefund.refundId(),\\n                refundAmount,\\n                booking.getCurrency(),\\n                reason,\\n                refundStatus\\n            ));\\n\\n            cancellationRequest.approve();\\n            if (refundStatus == RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED) {\\n                finaliseAfterRefund(booking.getId());\\n            }\\n\\n            return new CancellationResponse(\\n                booking.getBookingRef(),\\n                booking.getStatus(),\\n                new RefundResponse(refund.getStripeRefundId(), refund.getAmount(), refund.getCurrency(), refund.getStatus())\\n            );\\n        } catch (StripeIntegrationException ex) {\\n            booking.revertCancellationPending();\\n            cancellationRequest.reject();\\n            throw new RefundFailedException(\\\"Unable to process refund at this time. Please contact support.\\\", ex.getMessage());\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void finaliseAfterRefund(Long bookingId) {\\n        Booking booking = bookingRepository.findById(bookingId)\\n            .orElseThrow(() -> new BookingNotFoundException(bookingId));\\n\\n        if (booking.getStatus() == BookingStatus.CANCELLED) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        booking.cancel();\\n\\n        List<Long> seatIds = bookingItemRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).stream()\\n            .peek(BookingItem::cancel)\\n            .map(BookingItem::getSeatId)\\n            .filter(Objects::nonNull)\\n            .toList();\\n\\n        eTicketRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).forEach(ETicket::voidTicket);\\n\\n        refundRepository.findByBookingId(bookingId).ifPresent(refund -> refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED));\\n        cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(bookingId).ifPresent(CancellationRequest::approve);\\n\\n        afterCommitEventPublisher.publish(new BookingCancelledEvent(\\n            booking.getId(),\\n            booking.getCartId(),\\n            seatIds,\\n            booking.getUserId(),\\n            \\\"BUYER_CANCEL\\\"\\n        ));\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void handleRefundFailed(String refundId) {\\n        refundRepository.findByStripeRefundId(refundId).ifPresent(refund -> {\\n            refund.updateStatus(RefundStatus.FAILED);\\n            cancellationRequestRepository.findTopByBookingIdOrderByRequestedAtDesc(refund.getBookingId())\\n                .ifPresent(CancellationRequest::reject);\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    private SlotTimingResponse fetchSlotTiming(Long slotId) {\\n        SlotTimingResponse response = restClient.get()\\n            .uri(\\\"/internal/scheduling/slots/{slotId}/timing\\\", slotId)\\n            .retrieve()\\n            .onStatus(HttpStatusCode::isError, (request, httpResponse) -> {\\n                throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\\\"Unable to validate cancellation window\\\");\\n            })\\n            .body(new ParameterizedTypeReference<>() {\\n            });\\n        if (response == null || response.startTime() == null) {\\n            throw new CancellationNotAllowedException(\\\"Unable to validate cancellation window\\\");\\n        }\\n        return response;\\n    }\\n\\n    private RefundStatus toRefundStatus(String stripeStatus) {\\n        if (\\\"succeeded\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\\n            return RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED;\\n        }\\n        if (\\\"failed\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus) || \\\"canceled\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\\n            return RefundStatus.FAILED;\\n        }\\n        return RefundStatus.PENDING;\\n    }\\n\\n    public record SlotTimingResponse(Long slotId, Instant startTime) {\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.RefundRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.dto.StripeRefundResponse;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.stripe.service.StripeRefundService;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class RefundService {\\n\\n    private final RefundRepository refundRepository;\\n    private final CancellationService cancellationService;\\n    private final StripeRefundService stripeRefundService;\\n\\n    public RefundService(\\n        RefundRepository refundRepository,\\n        CancellationService cancellationService,\\n        StripeRefundService stripeRefundService\\n    ) {\\n        this.refundRepository = refundRepository;\\n        this.cancellationService = cancellationService;\\n        this.stripeRefundService = stripeRefundService;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Transactional\\n    public void updateRefundStatus(String stripeRefundId) {\\n        Refund refund = refundRepository.findByStripeRefundId(stripeRefundId).orElse(null);\\n        if (refund == null) {\\n            return;\\n        }\\n\\n        StripeRefundResponse stripeRefund = stripeRefundService.getRefund(stripeRefundId);\\n        RefundStatus nextStatus = toRefundStatus(stripeRefund.status());\\n        refund.updateStatus(nextStatus);\\n\\n        if (nextStatus == RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED) {\\n            cancellationService.finaliseAfterRefund(refund.getBookingId());\\n        } else if (nextStatus == RefundStatus.FAILED) {\\n            cancellationService.handleRefundFailed(stripeRefundId);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    private RefundStatus toRefundStatus(String stripeStatus) {\\n        if (\\\"succeeded\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\\n            return RefundStatus.SUCCEEDED;\\n        }\\n        if (\\\"failed\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus) || \\\"canceled\\\".equalsIgnoreCase(stripeStatus)) {\\n            return RefundStatus.FAILED;\\n        }\\n        return RefundStatus.PENDING;\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",

jakarta.validation.Valid;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Page;\\nimport org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable;\\nimport org.springframework.data.web.PageableDefault;\\nimport
