## Entry 689
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T17:56:31.622Z
**Role/Type:** turn_context
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T17:56:31.622Z",
  "type": "turn_context",
  "payload": {
    "turn_id": "019cb9fe-8704-70b1-bee1-cabb14d5f1ee",
    "cwd": "/home/dell/Multi-City-Event-Booking",
    "current_date": "2026-03-04",
    "timezone": "Asia/Kolkata",
    "approval_policy": "on-request",
    "sandbox_policy": {
      "type": "workspace-write",
      "network_access": false,
      "exclude_tmpdir_env_var": false,
      "exclude_slash_tmp": false
    },
    "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
    "personality": "pragmatic",
    "collaboration_mode": {
      "mode": "default",
      "settings": {
        "model": "gpt-5.3-codex",
        "reasoning_effort": "medium",
        "developer_instructions": "# Collaboration Mode: Default\n\nYou are now in Default mode. Any previous instructions for other modes (e.g. Plan mode) are no longer active.\n\nYour active mode changes only when new developer instructions with a different `<collaboration_mode>...</collaboration_mode>` change it; user requests or tool descriptions do not change mode by themselves. Known mode names are Default and Plan.\n\n## request_user_input availability\n\nThe `request_user_input` tool is unavailable in Default mode. If you call it while in Default mode, it will return an error.\n\nIn Default mode, strongly prefer making reasonable assumptions and executing the user's request rather than stopping to ask questions. If you absolutely must ask a question because the answer cannot be discovered from local context and a reasonable assumption would be risky, ask the user directly with a concise plain-text question. Never write a multiple choice question as a textual assistant message.\n"
      }
    },
    "effort": "medium",
    "summary": "none",
    "user_instructions": "# AGENTS.md — Reference Index\n\n> Every agent working in this codebase must read the files listed below before producing\n> any output. Each file governs a specific concern. Read the ones that apply to your task.\n\n---\n\n## Reference Files\n\n| File | Governs |\n|---|---|\n| `PRODUCT.md` | The 7 modules, what each one owns, dependency order, inter-module event map, Eventbrite ACL facade names, hard architectural rules, and where new code goes. Read this before touching any module. |\n| `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` | Eventbrite integration architecture: ACL facades, all FR flows (planned vs. implemented), critical constraints (no user/order creation, no single-order cancel, no seat locking), workarounds. Read before designing any Eventbrite feature. |\n| `docs/MODULE_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md` | Canonical folder and package layout for every module. The exact location of every layer: `api/controller/`, `api/dto/`, `domain/`, `service/`, `repository/`, `mapper/`, `event/published/`, `event/listener/`, `statemachine/`, `exception/`. Anti-patterns list. Read this before writing any class. |\n| `agents/SPEC_GENERATOR.md` | How to produce a `SPEC.md` for any feature. Eight confirmation-gated stages with module context and Eventbrite constraints built-in. Requirements → Domain Model → Architecture & File Structure → DB Schema → API → Business Logic → Error Handling → Tests. Read this before speccing any feature. |\n| `agents/CODING_AGENT.md` | Spring Boot 3.5.11 / Java 21 coding standards. Domain behaviour, service orchestration, mapper rules, controller rules, event rules, 10 Eventbrite ACL facades, inter-module communication (REST + Spring Events), admin/ special rules, state machine, Spring AI. Read this before writing any production code. |\n| `agents/TEST_AGENT.md` | Test agent responsibilities and best practices. Builds tests from `SPEC_*.md` Stage 8, executes tests, fixes test/code issues caused by behavior mismatches, and writes timestamped logs under `test_result_folder/`. Read this before writing or running tests. |\n| `docs/TESTING_GUIDE.md` | Four-layer test structure: `domain/` (unit), `service/` (Mockito), `api/` (@WebMvcTest), `arch/` (ArchUnit enforcing 10 hard rules + Eventbrite constraints). All rule examples, happy path, negative path, exception patterns. Read before writing any test. |\n| `mock-eventbrite-api/README.md` | **Mock Eventbrite Service:** Python FastAPI in-memory mock of Eventbrite API v3. Used for local development and testing. Exposes all 10 ACL facade endpoints without hitting production Eventbrite. See setup instructions below. |\n\n---\n\n## Module Quick Reference\n\nFull detail for each module is in `PRODUCT.md`. This table is a lookup only.\n\n| Module | Owns | Eventbrite ACL Facades Used |\n|---|---|---|\n| `discovery-catalog` | Events, Venues, Cities, catalog sync | `EbEventSyncService`, `EbTicketService` |\n| `scheduling` | Show slots, conflict validation | `EbEventSyncService` |\n| `identity` | Users, JWT, profiles, preferences, wallet | `EbAttendeeService` |\n| `booking-inventory` | Seats, SeatMap, Cart, Pricing, Seat Lock State Machine | `EbTicketService` |\n| `payments-ticketing` | Bookings, Payments, E-Tickets, Cancellations, Refunds, Wallet | `EbOrderService`, `EbAttendeeService`, `EbRefundService` |\n| `promotions` | Coupons, Promotions, Eligibility rules | `EbDiscountSyncService` |\n| `engagement` | Reviews, Moderation, AI Chatbot (`service/chatbot/`), RAG pipeline | `EbEventSyncService` |\n| `admin/` | No domain ownership. Orchestration and aggregation only. | — |\n| `shared/` | All external ACL facades, JWT, base classes, common DTOs, configs | — |\n\n---\n\n## Hard Rules — Never Violate\n\nCanonical numbering and wording are owned by `PRODUCT.md` Section 9. These shorthand rules apply to every task without exception.\n\n1. No module imports another module's `@Service`, `@Entity`, or `@Repository`.\n  - Exception: `admin/` MAY import module `@Service` beans for READ operations only; all writes MUST go through the owning module REST API.\n2. No module calls Eventbrite, Razorpay, or OpenAI HTTP directly — only through `shared/` ACL facades.\n3. ACL facade names are exactly as listed below — never invent new ones.\n4. Spring Events carry only primitives, IDs, enums, and value objects — never `@Entity` objects.\n5. One `GlobalExceptionHandler` in `shared/common/exception/` — never `@ControllerAdvice` in a module.\n6. All field mapping goes in `mapper/` using MapStruct — never inside a service or controller.\n7. `admin/` owns no `@Entity` and no database table.\n8. `shared/` has no dependency on any module.\n9. `app/` has zero business logic.\n10. Dependency direction is strictly downward — no circular imports between modules.\n\n---\n\n## Eventbrite ACL Facade Names (HARD RULE #3)\nRead the docs/eventbriteapiv3public.apib for detail API Endpoint with schema, Response, Request and errors\n\nAll 10 facades are in `shared/eventbrite/service/`. These are the ONLY things modules call for Eventbrite:\n\n1. **EbEventSyncService** — Create, update, publish, cancel events; pull org event catalog\n2. **EbVenueService** — Create and update venues; list org venues\n3. **EbScheduleService** — Create recurring event schedules and occurrences\n4. **EbTicketService** — Create/update ticket classes; manage inventory; check availability\n5. **EbCapacityService** — Retrieve and update event capacity tiers\n6. **EbOrderService** — Read orders post-checkout (NOT creation — JS SDK widget only)\n7. **EbAttendeeService** — List attendees; verify attendance for reviews\n8. **EbDiscountSyncService** — Create, update, delete discount codes\n9. **EbRefundService** — Read refund status only (NO submission API — workaround required)\n10. **EbWebhookService** — Mock/testing only; not used in production registration flow\n\n**See `docs/EVENTBRITE_INTEGRATION.md` for which module uses which facade and what gaps exist.**\n\n---\n\n## Module Dependency Order (HARD RULE #10)\n\n```\nshared/               <- foundational; no dependencies\n  |\n  v\ndiscovery-catalog    <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nscheduling           <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\nidentity             <- depends on shared only\n  |\n  v\nbooking-inventory    <- depends on shared + discovery-catalog (REST reads)\n  |\n  v\npayments-ticketing   <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\npromotions           <- depends on shared + booking-inventory + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nengagement           <- depends on shared + payments-ticketing + identity (REST)\n  |\n  v\nadmin/               <- thin orchestration; reads from all, writes via REST APIs\n  |\n  v\napp/                 <- entry point only; zero business logic\n```\n\n**Golden Rule:** Module at level N can depend on level N-1 or lower (or `shared/`) only. Never import from sibling or downstream modules.\n\n**See `PRODUCT.md` Section 2 for detailed rationale.**\n\n\n## Skills\nA skill is a set of local instructions to follow that is stored in a `SKILL.md` file. Below is the list of skills that can be used. Each entry includes a name, description, and file path so you can open the source for full instructions when using a specific skill.\n### Available skills\n- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like \"how do I do X\", \"find a skill for X\", \"is there a skill that can...\", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill. (file: /home/dell/.agents/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md)\n- skill-creator: Guide for creating effective skills. (file: /home/dell/.codex/skills/.system/skill-installer/SKILL.md)\n### How to use skills\n- Discovery: The list above is the skills available in this session (name + description + file path). Multiple mentions mean use them all. Do not carry skills across turns unless re-mentioned.\n- Missing/blocked: If a named skill isn't in the list or the path can't be read, say so briefly and continue with the best fallback.\n- How to use a skill (progressive disclosure):\n  1) After deciding to use a skill, open its `SKILL.md`. Read only enough to follow the workflow.\n  2) When `SKILL.md` references relative paths (e.g., `scripts/foo.py`), resolve them relative to the skill directory listed above first, and only consider other paths if needed.\n  3) If `SKILL.md` points to extra folders such as `references/`, load only the specific files needed for the request; don't bulk-load everything.\n  4) If `scripts/` exist, prefer running or patching them instead of retyping large code blocks.\n  5) If `assets/` or templates exist, reuse them instead of recreating from scratch.\n- Coordination and sequencing:\n  - If multiple skills apply, choose the minimal set that covers the request and state the order you'll use them.\n  - Announce which skill(s) you're using and why (one short line). InternalPaymentControllerTest.java (extend existing stub)\n435:## Stage 5 — API\n634:### `GET /api/v1/internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}`\n780:### 6.6 — Internal Watchdog API (`InternalPaymentController`)\n782:`GET /api/v1/internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}`:\n963:## Stage 8 — Tests\n1059:**`InternalPaymentControllerTest`** (extend existing stub)\nevent/listener/\n├── CartAssembledListener.java    ← extend stub: listens CartAssembledEvent → PaymentService.createCheckout()\n└── BookingConfirmedByPaymentListener.java  ← extend stub: publishes BookingConfirmedEvent after confirm\n\napi/controller/\n├── PaymentController.java        ← GET /checkout/{cartId}, POST /confirm, POST /failed\n├── BookingController.java        ← GET /bookings, GET /bookings/{ref}, POST /bookings/{ref}/cancel\n├── ETicketController.java        ← GET /tickets/{bookingRef}\n└── StripeWebhookController.java  ← POST /webhooks/stripe\n\napi/dto/request/\n├── PaymentConfirmRequest.java    ← { paymentIntentId }\n├── PaymentFailedRequest.java     ← { paymentIntentId }\n└── CancellationRequest.java      ← { reason }\n\napi/dto/response/\n├── CheckoutInitResponse.java     ← { cartId, bookingRef, paymentIntentId, clientSecret, amount, currency }\n├── BookingResponse.java          ← booking + items + e-ticket stubs\n├── BookingItemResponse.java      ← item-level detail\n├── BookingSummaryResponse.java   ← light summary for list endpoint\n├── ETicketResponse.java          ← { ticketCode, qrData, pdfUrl, status }\n└── RefundResponse.java           ← { stripeRefundId, amount, status }\n\nmapper/\n├── BookingMapper.java            ← Booking → BookingResponse / BookingSummaryResponse\n└── ETicketMapper.java            ← ETicket → ETicketResponse\n\nexception/\n├── BookingNotFoundException.java\n├── PaymentNotConfirmedException.java\n├── DuplicatePaymentException.java\n├── CancellationNotAllowedException.java\n├── RefundFailedException.java\n└── CartItemsFetchException.java\n\narch/\n└── PaymentsTicketingArchTest.java   ← ArchUnit rules\n\nsrc/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/\n├── domain/\n│   ├── BookingTest.java\n│   ├── RefundTest.java\n│   └── ETicketTest.java\n├── service/\n│   ├── PaymentServiceTest.java\n│   ├── CancellationServiceTest.java\n│   ├── RefundServiceTest.java\n│   └── ETicketServiceTest.java\n├── api/\n│   ├── PaymentControllerTest.java\n│   ├── BookingControllerTest.java\n│   ├── ETicketControllerTest.java\n│   ├── StripeWebhookControllerTest.java\n│   └── InternalPaymentControllerTest.java (extend existing stub)\n└── arch/\n    └── PaymentsTicketingArchTest.java\n```\n\n### Shared Events (all exist — no new files)\n\n| Event | Direction | Shared File |\n|---|---|---|\n| `CartAssembledEvent` | Consumed | ✅ `shared/common/event/published/CartAssembledEvent.java` |\n| `BookingConfirmedEvent` | Published | ✅ `shared/common/event/published/BookingConfirmedEvent.java` |\n| `PaymentFailedEvent` | Published | ✅ `shared/common/event/published/PaymentFailedEvent.java` |\n| `BookingCancelledEvent` | Published | ✅ `shared/common/event/published/BookingCancelledEvent.java` |\n\n---\n\n## Stage 4 — DB Schema\n\nAll 6 tables were created by pre-FR5 migrations (V26–V31). One new migration V32 fixes `e_tickets.status` default and adds the `UNIQUE (booking_item_id)` constraint.\n\n---\n\n### `bookings` — V26 (no changes)\n\n```sql\nbookings (\n  id                       BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_ref              VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL UNIQUE,   -- BK-{YYYYMMDD}-{seq}\n  cart_id                  BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- FK → carts.id (booking-inventory, cross-module ID)\n  user_id                  BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- FK → users.id (identity, cross-module ID)\n  event_id                 BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- FK → event_catalog.id\n  slot_id                  BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- FK → show_slots.id\n  status                   VARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',\n                                                           -- PENDING | CONFIRMED | CANCELLATION_PENDING | CANCELLED\n  stripe_payment_intent_id VARCHAR(255),\n  stripe_charge_id         VARCHAR(255),\n  total_amount             BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- smallest currency unit (paise for INR)\n  currency                 VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',\n  created_at               TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW(),\n  updated_at               TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW()\n)\nINDEXES: idx_bookings_user_id, idx_bookings_cart_id, idx_bookings_booking_ref\n```\n\n**Lifecycle note:** Created as `PENDING` when `CartAssembledEvent` arrives. Promoted to `CONFIRMED` after `retrievePaymentIntent` returns `succeeded`. Transitions to `CANCELLATION_PENDING` when buyer requests cancel. Transitions to `CANCELLED` after refund finalises.\n\n---\n\n### `booking_items` — V27 (no changes)\n\n```sql\nbooking_items (\n  id              BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_id      BIGINT       NOT NULL REFERENCES bookings(id),\n  seat_id         BIGINT,                         -- nullable: null for GA items\n  ga_claim_id     BIGINT,                         -- nullable: null for reserved seats\n  ticket_class_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,           -- eb_ticket_class_id from pricing tier\n  unit_price      BIGINT       NOT NULL,           -- smallest currency unit\n  currency        VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',\n  status          VARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',   -- ACTIVE | CANCELLED\n  created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW()\n)\nINDEXES: idx_booking_items_booking_id\n```\n\n---\n\n### `payments` — V28 (no changes)\n\n```sql\npayments (\n  id                       BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_id               BIGINT       NOT NULL REFERENCES bookings(id),\n  stripe_payment_intent_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n  stripe_charge_id         VARCHAR(255),          -- latest_charge from Stripe; filled on succeed\n  amount                   BIGINT       NOT NULL,\n  currency                 VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'inr',\n  status                   VARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', -- PENDING | SUCCESS | FAILED\n  failure_code             VARCHAR(100),\n  failure_message          TEXT,\n  created_at               TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW(),\n  updated_at               TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW()\n)\nINDEXES: idx_payments_booking_id, idx_payments_stripe_payment_intent_id\n```\n\n**Note:** `booking_id` is populated immediately because a `PENDING` `Booking` shell is always created before calling Stripe (Option B from Stage 4 outline).\n\n---\n\n### `e_tickets` — V29 + V32 patch\n\n```sql\ne_tickets (\n  id              BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_id      BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES bookings(id),\n  booking_item_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES booking_items(id),\n  qr_code_data    TEXT   NOT NULL,    -- Base64(\"{bookingRef}:{bookingItemId}\")\n  pdf_url         TEXT,               -- object storage URL; nullable until generated\n  status          VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',  -- ACTIVE | VOIDED  (V32 fixes 'VALID')\n  issued_at       TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n)\nINDEXES: idx_e_tickets_booking_id\nCONSTRAINT: UNIQUE (booking_item_id)   -- one ticket per item; added by V32\n```\n\n---\n\n### `refunds` — V30 (no changes)\n\n```sql\nrefunds (\n  id               BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_id       BIGINT       NOT NULL REFERENCES bookings(id),\n  stripe_refund_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,\n  amount           BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- smallest currency unit\n  currency         VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'inr',\n  reason           VARCHAR(100),  -- REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER | DUPLICATE | FRAUDULENT\n  status           VARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', -- PENDING | SUCCEEDED | FAILED\n  created_at       TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW(),\n  updated_at       TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW()\n)\nINDEXES: idx_refunds_booking_id\n```\n\n---\n\n### `cancellation_requests` — V31 (no changes)\n\n```sql\ncancellation_requests (\n  id           BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_id   BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES bookings(id),\n  user_id      BIGINT NOT NULL,\n  reason       TEXT,\n  status       VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', -- PENDING | APPROVED | REJECTED\n  requested_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n  resolved_at  TIMESTAMPTZ\n)\nINDEXES: idx_cancellation_requests_booking_id\n```\n\n---\n\n### V32 — New Migration\n\n```sql\n-- V32__fix_e_tickets_status_default_and_unique_item.sql\n      \"unitPrice\": 75000,\n      \"status\": \"ACTIVE\",\n      \"eTicket\": {\n        \"ticketCode\": \"BK-20260304-001:1\",\n        \"qrCodeData\": \"QlItMjAyNjAzMDQtMDAxOjE=\",\n        \"pdfUrl\": \"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/1.pdf\",\n        \"status\": \"ACTIVE\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```\n\n**Errors:**\n- `404 BOOKING_NOT_FOUND` (also returned when booking belongs to different user — never reveal existence)\n- `403 FORBIDDEN` omitted in favour of `404` to prevent enumeration\n\n---\n\n### `POST /api/v1/bookings/{bookingRef}/cancel`\n\n**Auth:** JWT `ROLE_USER`, must own booking\n**Purpose:** Buyer-initiated cancellation — triggers Stripe refund.\n\n**Request:**\n```json\n{ \"reason\": \"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\" }\n```\n\n**Response `200 OK`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"bookingRef\": \"BK-20260304-001\",\n  \"status\": \"CANCELLATION_PENDING\",\n  \"refund\": {\n    \"stripeRefundId\": \"re_1Nispe...\",\n    \"amount\": 150000,\n    \"currency\": \"inr\",\n    \"status\": \"PENDING\"\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**Errors:**\n- `404 BOOKING_NOT_FOUND`\n- `409 CANCELLATION_NOT_ALLOWED` — already cancelled, wrong status, or outside window; includes `reason` and `windowClosedAt` where applicable\n\n---\n\n### `GET /api/v1/tickets/{bookingRef}`\n\n**Auth:** JWT `ROLE_USER`, must own booking\n**Purpose:** Returns all e-tickets for a booking for display and download.\n\n**Response `200 OK`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"bookingRef\": \"BK-20260304-001\",\n  \"tickets\": [\n    {\n      \"ticketCode\": \"BK-20260304-001:1\",\n      \"bookingItemId\": 1,\n      \"qrCodeData\": \"QlItMjAyNjAzMDQtMDAxOjE=\",\n      \"pdfUrl\": \"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/1.pdf\",\n      \"status\": \"ACTIVE\"\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```\n\n**Errors:** `404 BOOKING_NOT_FOUND`\n\n---\n\n### `GET /api/v1/internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}`\n\n**Auth:** No public JWT — internal path; permitted via `SecurityConfig` pattern rule; restrict to internal network in production\n**Purpose:** Answers `booking-inventory`'s `PaymentTimeoutWatchdog` — is payment confirmed for this cart?\n\n**Response `200 OK`:**\n```json\n{ \"cartId\": 42, \"confirmed\": true }\n```\n\n---\n\n### `POST /api/v1/webhooks/stripe`\n\n**Auth:** None (public) — verified via `Stripe-Signature` header inside handler\n**Purpose:** Safety net for async Stripe events; handles cases where frontend callback was missed.\n\n**Handled events:**\n\n| Stripe Event | Your Action |\n|---|---|\n| `payment_intent.succeeded` | Idempotent booking confirm — skip if already `CONFIRMED` |\n| `payment_intent.payment_failed` | Publish `PaymentFailedEvent`; set `payments.status = FAILED` |\n| `payment_intent.canceled` | Same as `payment_failed` |\n| `refund.updated` | Update `refunds.status`; finalise cancellation if `succeeded` |\n| `refund.failed` | Set `refunds.status = FAILED`; log ops alert |\n\n**Response:** `200 OK` for all recognised and unrecognised events; `400` on signature failure only.\n\n---\n\n## Stage 6 — Business Logic\n\n### 6.1 — PaymentIntent Creation (`CartAssembledListener` → `PaymentService.createCheckout()`)\n\n**Trigger:** `CartAssembledEvent(cartId, slotId, userId, orgId, ebEventId, couponCode, totalAmountInSmallestUnit, currency, userEmail)`\n\n**Steps (within `@Transactional`):**\n1. **Idempotency check:** query `bookingRepository.findByCartId(cartId)`. If a `Booking` exists and its `Payment.status` is `PENDING` or `SUCCESS` — return existing `paymentIntentId` immediately. No Stripe call.\n2. **Generate `bookingRef`:** `\"BK-\" + LocalDate.now(UTC).format(\"yyyyMMdd\") + \"-\" + leftPad(dailyAtomicSeq.incrementAndGet(), 3, '0')`. `dailyAtomicSeq` is an in-memory `AtomicLong` reset at midnight via `@Scheduled(cron = \"0 0 0 * * *\")`.\n3. **Create `Booking` shell:** `status=PENDING`, `cartId`, `userId`, `slotId`, `eventId` (resolved via `slotId` from scheduling REST), `totalAmount = totalAmountInSmallestUnit`, `currency`, `bookingRef`. Persist immediately — required as FK anchor for `Payment`.\n4. **Call Stripe:** `StripePaymentService.createPaymentIntent(amount, currency, userEmail, Map.of(\"booking_ref\", bookingRef, \"user_id\", userId.toString()))`.\n5. **`clientSecret` handling:** stored in local variable only — passed directly into response DTO, never assigned to any entity field.\n6. **Persist `Payment`:** `bookingId`, `stripePaymentIntentId`, `amount`, `currency`, `status=PENDING`.\n7. **Return** `CheckoutInitResponse(cartId, bookingRef, paymentIntentId, clientSecret, amount, currency)` to `GET /checkout/{cartId}` caller.\n\n**On `StripeIntegrationException`:** rollback transaction (no `Booking` or `Payment` row). Log `ERROR`. Frontend will retry via `GET /checkout/{cartId}`.\n\n---\n\n### 6.2 — Payment Confirmation (`PaymentService.confirmPayment()`)\n\n**Trigger:** `POST /api/v1/payments/confirm { paymentIntentId }`\n\n**Steps:**\n1. Load `Payment` by `stripePaymentIntentId` — throw `PaymentIntentNotFoundException` if absent.\n2. **Idempotency:** if `payment.status = SUCCESS` (and `booking.status = CONFIRMED`) — return existing `bookingRef` immediately.\n3. Call `StripePaymentService.retrievePaymentIntent(paymentIntentId)`.\n4. If returned status ≠ `succeeded` — throw `PaymentNotConfirmedException(stripeStatus)`.\n5. **Within `@Transactional`:**\n   - Set `payment.stripeChargeId = response.latestCharge`.\n   - Set `payment.status = SUCCESS`, `payment.updatedAt = NOW()`.\n   - Set `booking.stripeChargeId = response.latestCharge`, `booking.status = CONFIRMED`, `booking.updatedAt = NOW()`.\n   - Fetch cart items via REST: `GET /api/v1/booking/carts/{cartId}/items` on `booking-inventory`. Throw `CartItemsFetchException` on non-2xx — rollback everything.\n   - For each `CartItem`: create `BookingItem(bookingId, seatId, gaClaimId, ticketClassId, unitPrice, currency, status=ACTIVE)`. Persist.\n   - For each `BookingItem`: create `ETicket(bookingId, bookingItemId, qrCodeData=Base64(\"{bookingRef}:{bookingItemId}\"), pdfUrl=\"/tickets/{bookingRef}/{bookingItemId}.pdf\", status=ACTIVE)`. Persist.\n6. **Publish** `BookingConfirmedEvent(cartId, seatIds, stripePaymentIntentId, userId)` via `@TransactionalEventListener(AFTER_COMMIT)`.\n\n---\n\n### 6.3 — Payment Failure (`PaymentService.handleFailure()`)\n\n**Triggers:** `POST /api/v1/payments/failed` (frontend) **OR** Stripe webhook `payment_intent.payment_failed` / `payment_intent.canceled`.\n\n**Steps (fully idempotent — whichever trigger arrives first wins):**\n1. Load `Payment` by `stripePaymentIntentId`.\n2. If `payment.status = FAILED` already — return immediately (no-op).\n3. **Within `@Transactional`:**\n   - Set `payment.status = FAILED`, populate `failureCode`/`failureMessage` from Stripe response where available.\n   - Set `booking.status = CANCELLED`, `booking.updatedAt = NOW()`.\n4. **Publish** `PaymentFailedEvent(cartId, userId)` — `booking-inventory`'s `PaymentFailedListener` fires `RELEASE` transition on all `HARD_LOCKED` seats in the cart.\n\n---\n\n### 6.4 — Buyer-Initiated Cancellation (`CancellationService.cancel()`)\n\n**Trigger:** `POST /api/v1/bookings/{bookingRef}/cancel { reason }`\n\n**Steps:**\n1. Load `Booking` by `bookingRef`. If `booking.userId ≠ JWT principal userId` — throw `BookingNotFoundException` (never `403` — do not reveal existence to non-owners).\n2. Assert `booking.status = CONFIRMED` — throw `CancellationNotAllowedException(\"Booking is not in CONFIRMED state\")` otherwise.\n3. Resolve `slotStartTime` via `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots/{slotId}` (REST read to scheduling). Assert `NOW() < slotStartTime - cancellationWindowHours` — throw `CancellationNotAllowedException(\"Outside cancellation window\", windowClosedAt)` if past window.\n4. Create `CancellationRequest(bookingId, userId, reason, status=PENDING)`. Persist.\n5. Set `booking.status = CANCELLATION_PENDING`. Persist.\n6. Compute refund amount:\n   - Read `payments.cancellation.fee-percent` from `application.yaml` (default `0`).\n   - `refundAmount = totalAmount - floor(totalAmount * feePercent / 100)`.\n7. Call `StripeRefundService.createRefund(stripePaymentIntentId, refundAmount, reason)`.\n8. On Stripe response:\n   - Persist `Refund(bookingId, stripeRefundId, refundAmount, reason, status from Stripe response)`.\n   - Update `CancellationRequest.status = APPROVED`.\n   - If Stripe returned `status = succeeded` immediately → call `finaliseAfterRefund(bookingId)` inline.\n   - If Stripe returned `status = pending` → finalisation deferred to `refund.updated` webhook.\n9. Return `CancellationResponse(bookingRef, status=CANCELLATION_PENDING, refund{...})`.\n\n**On `StripeIntegrationException` from `createRefund`:**\n- Revert `booking.status = CONFIRMED`.\n- Set `CancellationRequest.status = REJECTED`.\n- Throw `RefundFailedException`.\n\n---\n\n### 6.4.1 — Cancellation Finalisation (`CancellationService.finaliseAfterRefund()`)\n\nCalled inline (when Stripe refund is immediately `succeeded`) or from `RefundService` when `refund.updated` webhook delivers `status = succeeded`.\n\n**Steps (idempotent guard: skip if `booking.status = CANCELLED`):**\n1. **Within `@Transactional`:**\n   - `booking.status = CANCELLED`, `booking.updatedAt = NOW()`.\n   - All `BookingItem.status = CANCELLED`.\n   - All `ETicket.status = VOIDED`.\n   - `Refund.status = SUCCEEDED`.\n   - `CancellationRequest.status = APPROVED`, `resolvedAt = NOW()`.\n2. **Publish** `BookingCancelledEvent(bookingId, cartId, seatIds, userId, reason)` via `@TransactionalEventListener(AFTER_COMMIT)`.\n   - `booking-inventory` listener releases seats (`CONFIRMED → AVAILABLE`).\n   - `engagement` listener notifies user.\n\n- `qrCodeData_format_is_bookingRef_colon_itemId` — asserts `Base64(\"{bookingRef}:{bookingItemId}\")`\n- `void_transition_active_to_voided_succeeds`\n- `void_already_voided_is_idempotent`\n\n---\n\n### `service/` — Mockito Unit Tests\n\n**`PaymentServiceTest`**\n- `createCheckout_newCart_createsBookingAndPayment_returnsClientSecret`\n- `createCheckout_duplicateCartId_returnsExistingPaymentIntentId_noStripeCall`\n- `createCheckout_stripeThrows_rollsBackTransaction`\n- `confirmPayment_stripeSucceeded_confirmsBookingAndCreatesItemsAndTickets`\n- `confirmPayment_alreadyConfirmed_returnsExistingBookingRef_noDbWrites`\n- `confirmPayment_stripeRequiresAction_throwsPaymentNotConfirmedException`\n- `confirmPayment_stripeTimeout_throwsAndLeavesBookingPending`\n- `confirmPayment_cartItemsFetchFails_rollsBackTransaction`\n- `handleFailure_setsPaymentFailedAndBookingCancelled_publishesPaymentFailedEvent`\n- `handleFailure_alreadyFailed_isNoOp`\n\n**`CancellationServiceTest`**\n- `cancel_withinWindow_fullRefund_finalisesImmediatelyOnStripeSuccess`\n- `cancel_withinWindow_partialRefund_deductsFeeFromStripeAmount`\n- `cancel_withinWindow_asyncRefund_leavesBookingCancellationPending`\n- `cancel_outsideWindow_throwsCancellationNotAllowedException`\n- `cancel_wrongStatus_pending_throwsCancellationNotAllowedException`\n- `cancel_wrongStatus_alreadyCancelled_throwsCancellationNotAllowedException`\n- `cancel_nonOwner_throwsBookingNotFoundException`\n- `cancel_stripeFails_revertsBookingToConfirmed_throwsRefundFailedException`\n- `finaliseAfterRefund_succeeds_voidsTicketsAndPublishesBookingCancelledEvent`\n- `finaliseAfterRefund_alreadyCancelled_isIdempotent`\n\n**`RefundServiceTest`**\n- `updateStatus_succeededWebhook_callsFinaliseAfterRefund`\n- `updateStatus_failedWebhook_setsRefundFailedAndLeavesBookingCancellationPending_noEventPublished`\n- `updateStatus_unknownRefundId_logsWarnAndReturns`\n\n**`ETicketServiceTest`**\n- `generate_createsOneTicketPerItem_qrDataMatchesFormat`\n- `generate_constraintViolation_returnsExistingTicket`\n- `voidTickets_setsAllStatusToVoided`\n\n---\n\n### `api/` — `@WebMvcTest`\n\n**`PaymentControllerTest`**\n- `GET /checkout/{cartId}` — `200 OK` with `clientSecret` for valid cart\n- `GET /checkout/{cartId}` — `404` for unknown cart\n- `GET /checkout/{cartId}` — `409` with existing `paymentIntentId` when payment already exists\n- `POST /confirm` — `200 OK` on `succeeded` status\n- `POST /confirm` — `402` when Stripe status is `requires_action`\n- `POST /confirm` — `409` when booking already `CONFIRMED`\n- `POST /failed` — `200 OK` triggers `PaymentFailedEvent`\n- `POST /failed` — `404` for unknown `paymentIntentId`\n\n**`BookingControllerTest`**\n- `GET /bookings` — `200 OK` with paginated results for authenticated user\n- `GET /bookings` — `401` without JWT\n- `GET /bookings/{ref}` — `200 OK` with full detail for owner\n- `GET /bookings/{ref}` — `404` for non-owner or unknown ref\n- `POST /bookings/{ref}/cancel` — `200 OK` within window\n- `POST /bookings/{ref}/cancel` — `409` outside window\n- `POST /bookings/{ref}/cancel` — `409` when status is not CONFIRMED\n- `POST /bookings/{ref}/cancel` — `404` for non-owner\n\n**`ETicketControllerTest`**\n- `GET /tickets/{ref}` — `200 OK` with ticket list for owner\n- `GET /tickets/{ref}` — `404` for non-owner\n\n**`StripeWebhookControllerTest`**\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `400` on invalid `Stripe-Signature`\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on `payment_intent.succeeded` (idempotent confirm)\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on `payment_intent.payment_failed` (publishes event)\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on `refund.updated` with `status=succeeded`\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on `refund.failed` (logs alert, no event)\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on unknown event type (silent)\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on unknown `paymentIntentId` (logs WARN, no-op)\n\n**`InternalPaymentControllerTest`** (extend existing stub)\n- `GET /internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}` — `{ confirmed: true }` when booking is CONFIRMED\n- `GET /internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}` — `{ confirmed: false }` when no CONFIRMED booking\n\n---\n\n### `arch/` — ArchUnit\n\n**`PaymentsTicketingArchTest`**\n- `no_class_in_paymentsticketing_imports_from_bookinginventory_package` — classes in `com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing` must not import any class from `com.eventplatform.bookinginventory`\n- `no_class_in_paymentsticketing_imports_from_scheduling_package` — same for `com.eventplatform.scheduling`\n- `no_class_in_paymentsticketing_imports_from_identity_package` — same for `com.eventplatform.identity`\n- `no_ControllerAdvice_annotation_in_paymentsticketing_package` — `@ControllerAdvice` must not appear; error handling is in `shared/`\n- `no_stripe_sdk_import_outside_shared_stripe_package` — classes outside `com.eventplatform.shared.stripe` must not import `com.stripe.*` directly\n\n---\n\n## Open Questions\n\n1. **`bookingRef` sequence at scale:** Current design uses an in-memory `AtomicLong` reset daily. If the app runs on multiple pods, sequences will collide. In a single-instance deployment this is fine. For multi-instance, replace with a DB sequence (`nextval`) or a UUID-based ref. Defer to ops decision before launch.\n\n2. **Cart items REST contract:** `GET /api/v1/booking/carts/{cartId}/items` is called from `payments-ticketing` during booking confirmation. This endpoint must be verified to exist in `booking-inventory` as part of FR4 implementation. Add to pre-FR5 checklist if not present.\n\n3. **Cancellation window source:** `slotStartTime` is fetched via REST to `scheduling`. If the scheduling service is temporarily unavailable, cancellation requests will fail. Consider caching `slotStartTime` on the `Booking` record at creation time to avoid a cross-module call on the cancellation hot path.\n\n4. **PDF generation:** E-ticket `pdfUrl` is currently a placeholder path. Actual PDF generation (e.g. via iText or a PDF microservice) is deferred. The `ETicketService` should expose a `generatePdf(Long bookingItemId)` method stub for future implementation.\n\n5. **`payments.cancellation.fee-percent` config:** Currently a flat global percentage. Per-event or per-organiser cancellation policies are out of scope for FR5. If required in future, a `cancellation_policy` table should be introduced in `payments-ticketing`.\n"
  }
}

|\n\n---\n\n## Stage 4 — DB Schema\n\nAll 6 tables were created by pre-FR5 migrations (V26–V31). One new migration V32 fixes `e_tickets.status` default and adds the `UNIQUE (booking_item_id)` constraint.\n\n---\n\n### `bookings` — V26 (no changes)\n\n```sql\nbookings (\n  id                       BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_ref              VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL UNIQUE,   -- BK-{YYYYMMDD}-{seq}\n  cart_id                  BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- FK → carts.id (booking-inventory, cross-module ID)\n  user_id                  BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- FK → users.id (identity, cross-module ID)\n  event_id                 BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- FK → event_catalog.id\n  slot_id                  BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- FK → show_slots.id\n  status                   VARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',\n                                                           -- PENDING | CONFIRMED | CANCELLATION_PENDING | CANCELLED\n  stripe_payment_intent_id VARCHAR(255),\n  stripe_charge_id         VARCHAR(255),\n  total_amount             BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- smallest currency unit (paise for INR)\n  currency                 VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',\n  created_at               TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW(),\n  updated_at               TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW()\n)\nINDEXES: idx_bookings_user_id, idx_bookings_cart_id, idx_bookings_booking_ref\n```\n\n**Lifecycle note:** Created as `PENDING` when `CartAssembledEvent` arrives. Promoted to `CONFIRMED` after `retrievePaymentIntent` returns `succeeded`. Transitions to `CANCELLATION_PENDING` when buyer requests cancel. Transitions to `CANCELLED` after refund finalises.\n\n---\n\n### `booking_items` — V27 (no changes)\n\n```sql\nbooking_items (\n  id              BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_id      BIGINT       NOT NULL REFERENCES bookings(id),\n  seat_id         BIGINT,                         -- nullable: null for GA items\n  ga_claim_id     BIGINT,                         -- nullable: null for reserved seats\n  ticket_class_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,           -- eb_ticket_class_id from pricing tier\n  unit_price      BIGINT       NOT NULL,           -- smallest currency unit\n  currency        VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INR',\n  status          VARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',   -- ACTIVE | CANCELLED\n  created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW()\n)\nINDEXES: idx_booking_items_booking_id\n```\n\n---\n\n### `payments` — V28 (no changes)\n\n```sql\npayments (\n  id                       BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_id               BIGINT       NOT NULL REFERENCES bookings(id),\n  stripe_payment_intent_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,\n  stripe_charge_id         VARCHAR(255),          -- latest_charge from Stripe; filled on succeed\n  amount                   BIGINT       NOT NULL,\n  currency                 VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'inr',\n  status                   VARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', -- PENDING | SUCCESS | FAILED\n  failure_code             VARCHAR(100),\n  failure_message          TEXT,\n  created_at               TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW(),\n  updated_at               TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW()\n)\nINDEXES: idx_payments_booking_id, idx_payments_stripe_payment_intent_id\n```\n\n**Note:** `booking_id` is populated immediately because a `PENDING` `Booking` shell is always created before calling Stripe (Option B from Stage 4 outline).\n\n---\n\n### `e_tickets` — V29 + V32 patch\n\n```sql\ne_tickets (\n  id              BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_id      BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES bookings(id),\n  booking_item_id BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES booking_items(id),\n  qr_code_data    TEXT   NOT NULL,    -- Base64(\"{bookingRef}:{bookingItemId}\")\n  pdf_url         TEXT,               -- object storage URL; nullable until generated\n  status          VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',  -- ACTIVE | VOIDED  (V32 fixes 'VALID')\n  issued_at       TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n)\nINDEXES: idx_e_tickets_booking_id\nCONSTRAINT: UNIQUE (booking_item_id)   -- one ticket per item; added by V32\n```\n\n---\n\n### `refunds` — V30 (no changes)\n\n```sql\nrefunds (\n  id               BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_id       BIGINT       NOT NULL REFERENCES bookings(id),\n  stripe_refund_id VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE,\n  amount           BIGINT       NOT NULL,          -- smallest currency unit\n  currency         VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'inr',\n  reason           VARCHAR(100),  -- REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER | DUPLICATE | FRAUDULENT\n  status           VARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', -- PENDING | SUCCEEDED | FAILED\n  created_at       TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW(),\n  updated_at       TIMESTAMPTZ  DEFAULT NOW()\n)\nINDEXES: idx_refunds_booking_id\n```\n\n---\n\n### `cancellation_requests` — V31 (no changes)\n\n```sql\ncancellation_requests (\n  id           BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,\n  booking_id   BIGINT NOT NULL REFERENCES bookings(id),\n  user_id      BIGINT NOT NULL,\n  reason       TEXT,\n  status       VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', -- PENDING | APPROVED | REJECTED\n  requested_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n  resolved_at  TIMESTAMPTZ\n)\nINDEXES: idx_cancellation_requests_booking_id\n```\n\n---\n\n### V32 — New Migration\n\n```sql\n-- V32__fix_e_tickets_status_default_and_unique_item.sql\n      \"unitPrice\": 75000,\n      \"status\": \"ACTIVE\",\n      \"eTicket\": {\n        \"ticketCode\": \"BK-20260304-001:1\",\n        \"qrCodeData\": \"QlItMjAyNjAzMDQtMDAxOjE=\",\n        \"pdfUrl\": \"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/1.pdf\",\n        \"status\": \"ACTIVE\"\n      }\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```\n\n**Errors:**\n- `404 BOOKING_NOT_FOUND` (also returned when booking belongs to different user — never reveal existence)\n- `403 FORBIDDEN` omitted in favour of `404` to prevent enumeration\n\n---\n\n### `POST /api/v1/bookings/{bookingRef}/cancel`\n\n**Auth:** JWT `ROLE_USER`, must own booking\n**Purpose:** Buyer-initiated cancellation — triggers Stripe refund.\n\n**Request:**\n```json\n{ \"reason\": \"REQUESTED_BY_CUSTOMER\" }\n```\n\n**Response `200 OK`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"bookingRef\": \"BK-20260304-001\",\n  \"status\": \"CANCELLATION_PENDING\",\n  \"refund\": {\n    \"stripeRefundId\": \"re_1Nispe...\",\n    \"amount\": 150000,\n    \"currency\": \"inr\",\n    \"status\": \"PENDING\"\n  }\n}\n```\n\n**Errors:**\n- `404 BOOKING_NOT_FOUND`\n- `409 CANCELLATION_NOT_ALLOWED` — already cancelled, wrong status, or outside window; includes `reason` and `windowClosedAt` where applicable\n\n---\n\n### `GET /api/v1/tickets/{bookingRef}`\n\n**Auth:** JWT `ROLE_USER`, must own booking\n**Purpose:** Returns all e-tickets for a booking for display and download.\n\n**Response `200 OK`:**\n```json\n{\n  \"bookingRef\": \"BK-20260304-001\",\n  \"tickets\": [\n    {\n      \"ticketCode\": \"BK-20260304-001:1\",\n      \"bookingItemId\": 1,\n      \"qrCodeData\": \"QlItMjAyNjAzMDQtMDAxOjE=\",\n      \"pdfUrl\": \"/tickets/BK-20260304-001/1.pdf\",\n      \"status\": \"ACTIVE\"\n    }\n  ]\n}\n```\n\n**Errors:** `404 BOOKING_NOT_FOUND`\n\n---\n\n### `GET /api/v1/internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}`\n\n**Auth:** No public JWT — internal path; permitted via `SecurityConfig` pattern rule; restrict to internal network in production\n**Purpose:** Answers `booking-inventory`'s `PaymentTimeoutWatchdog` — is payment confirmed for this cart?\n\n**Response `200 OK`:**\n```json\n{ \"cartId\": 42, \"confirmed\": true }\n```\n\n---\n\n### `POST /api/v1/webhooks/stripe`\n\n**Auth:** None (public) — verified via `Stripe-Signature` header inside handler\n**Purpose:** Safety net for async Stripe events; handles cases where frontend callback was missed.\n\n**Handled events:**\n\n| Stripe Event | Your Action |\n|---|---|\n| `payment_intent.succeeded` | Idempotent booking confirm — skip if already `CONFIRMED` |\n| `payment_intent.payment_failed` | Publish `PaymentFailedEvent`; set `payments.status = FAILED` |\n| `payment_intent.canceled` | Same as `payment_failed` |\n| `refund.updated` | Update `refunds.status`; finalise cancellation if `succeeded` |\n| `refund.failed` | Set `refunds.status = FAILED`; log ops alert |\n\n**Response:** `200 OK` for all recognised and unrecognised events; `400` on signature failure only.\n\n---\n\n## Stage 6 — Business Logic\n\n### 6.1 — PaymentIntent Creation (`CartAssembledListener` → `PaymentService.createCheckout()`)\n\n**Trigger:** `CartAssembledEvent(cartId, slotId, userId, orgId, ebEventId, couponCode, totalAmountInSmallestUnit, currency, userEmail)`\n\n**Steps (within `@Transactional`):**\n1. **Idempotency check:** query `bookingRepository.findByCartId(cartId)`. If a `Booking` exists and its `Payment.status` is `PENDING` or `SUCCESS` — return existing `paymentIntentId` immediately. No Stripe call.\n2. **Generate `bookingRef`:** `\"BK-\" + LocalDate.now(UTC).format(\"yyyyMMdd\") + \"-\" + leftPad(dailyAtomicSeq.incrementAndGet(), 3, '0')`. `dailyAtomicSeq` is an in-memory `AtomicLong` reset at midnight via `@Scheduled(cron = \"0 0 0 * * *\")`.\n3. **Create `Booking` shell:** `status=PENDING`, `cartId`, `userId`, `slotId`, `eventId` (resolved via `slotId` from scheduling REST), `totalAmount = totalAmountInSmallestUnit`, `currency`, `bookingRef`. Persist immediately — required as FK anchor for `Payment`.\n4. **Call Stripe:** `StripePaymentService.createPaymentIntent(amount, currency, userEmail, Map.of(\"booking_ref\", bookingRef, \"user_id\", userId.toString()))`.\n5. **`clientSecret` handling:** stored in local variable only — passed directly into response DTO, never assigned to any entity field.\n6. **Persist `Payment`:** `bookingId`, `stripePaymentIntentId`, `amount`, `currency`, `status=PENDING`.\n7. **Return** `CheckoutInitResponse(cartId, bookingRef, paymentIntentId, clientSecret, amount, currency)` to `GET /checkout/{cartId}` caller.\n\n**On `StripeIntegrationException`:** rollback transaction (no `Booking` or `Payment` row). Log `ERROR`. Frontend will retry via `GET /checkout/{cartId}`.\n\n---\n\n### 6.2 — Payment Confirmation (`PaymentService.confirmPayment()`)\n\n**Trigger:** `POST /api/v1/payments/confirm { paymentIntentId }`\n\n**Steps:**\n1. Load `Payment` by `stripePaymentIntentId` — throw `PaymentIntentNotFoundException` if absent.\n2. **Idempotency:** if `payment.status = SUCCESS` (and `booking.status = CONFIRMED`) — return existing `bookingRef` immediately.\n3. Call `StripePaymentService.retrievePaymentIntent(paymentIntentId)`.\n4. If returned status ≠ `succeeded` — throw `PaymentNotConfirmedException(stripeStatus)`.\n5. **Within `@Transactional`:**\n   - Set `payment.stripeChargeId = response.latestCharge`.\n   - Set `payment.status = SUCCESS`, `payment.updatedAt = NOW()`.\n   - Set `booking.stripeChargeId = response.latestCharge`, `booking.status = CONFIRMED`, `booking.updatedAt = NOW()`.\n   - Fetch cart items via REST: `GET /api/v1/booking/carts/{cartId}/items` on `booking-inventory`. Throw `CartItemsFetchException` on non-2xx — rollback everything.\n   - For each `CartItem`: create `BookingItem(bookingId, seatId, gaClaimId, ticketClassId, unitPrice, currency, status=ACTIVE)`. Persist.\n   - For each `BookingItem`: create `ETicket(bookingId, bookingItemId, qrCodeData=Base64(\"{bookingRef}:{bookingItemId}\"), pdfUrl=\"/tickets/{bookingRef}/{bookingItemId}.pdf\", status=ACTIVE)`. Persist.\n6. **Publish** `BookingConfirmedEvent(cartId, seatIds, stripePaymentIntentId, userId)` via `@TransactionalEventListener(AFTER_COMMIT)`.\n\n---\n\n### 6.3 — Payment Failure (`PaymentService.handleFailure()`)\n\n**Triggers:** `POST /api/v1/payments/failed` (frontend) **OR** Stripe webhook `payment_intent.payment_failed` / `payment_intent.canceled`.\n\n**Steps (fully idempotent — whichever trigger arrives first wins):**\n1. Load `Payment` by `stripePaymentIntentId`.\n2. If `payment.status = FAILED` already — return immediately (no-op).\n3. **Within `@Transactional`:**\n   - Set `payment.status = FAILED`, populate `failureCode`/`failureMessage` from Stripe response where available.\n   - Set `booking.status = CANCELLED`, `booking.updatedAt = NOW()`.\n4. **Publish** `PaymentFailedEvent(cartId, userId)` — `booking-inventory`'s `PaymentFailedListener` fires `RELEASE` transition on all `HARD_LOCKED` seats in the cart.\n\n---\n\n### 6.4 — Buyer-Initiated Cancellation (`CancellationService.cancel()`)\n\n**Trigger:** `POST /api/v1/bookings/{bookingRef}/cancel { reason }`\n\n**Steps:**\n1. Load `Booking` by `bookingRef`. If `booking.userId ≠ JWT principal userId` — throw `BookingNotFoundException` (never `403` — do not reveal existence to non-owners).\n2. Assert `booking.status = CONFIRMED` — throw `CancellationNotAllowedException(\"Booking is not in CONFIRMED state\")` otherwise.\n3. Resolve `slotStartTime` via `GET /api/v1/scheduling/slots/{slotId}` (REST read to scheduling). Assert `NOW() < slotStartTime - cancellationWindowHours` — throw `CancellationNotAllowedException(\"Outside cancellation window\", windowClosedAt)` if past window.\n4. Create `CancellationRequest(bookingId, userId, reason, status=PENDING)`. Persist.\n5. Set `booking.status = CANCELLATION_PENDING`. Persist.\n6. Compute refund amount:\n   - Read `payments.cancellation.fee-percent` from `application.yaml` (default `0`).\n   - `refundAmount = totalAmount - floor(totalAmount * feePercent / 100)`.\n7. Call `StripeRefundService.createRefund(stripePaymentIntentId, refundAmount, reason)`.\n8. On Stripe response:\n   - Persist `Refund(bookingId, stripeRefundId, refundAmount, reason, status from Stripe response)`.\n   - Update `CancellationRequest.status = APPROVED`.\n   - If Stripe returned `status = succeeded` immediately → call `finaliseAfterRefund(bookingId)` inline.\n   - If Stripe returned `status = pending` → finalisation deferred to `refund.updated` webhook.\n9. Return `CancellationResponse(bookingRef, status=CANCELLATION_PENDING, refund{...})`.\n\n**On `StripeIntegrationException` from `createRefund`:**\n- Revert `booking.status = CONFIRMED`.\n- Set `CancellationRequest.status = REJECTED`.\n- Throw `RefundFailedException`.\n\n---\n\n### 6.4.1 — Cancellation Finalisation (`CancellationService.finaliseAfterRefund()`)\n\nCalled inline (when Stripe refund is immediately `succeeded`) or from `RefundService` when `refund.updated` webhook delivers `status = succeeded`.\n\n**Steps (idempotent guard: skip if `booking.status = CANCELLED`):**\n1. **Within `@Transactional`:**\n   - `booking.status = CANCELLED`, `booking.updatedAt = NOW()`.\n   - All `BookingItem.status = CANCELLED`.\n   - All `ETicket.status = VOIDED`.\n   - `Refund.status = SUCCEEDED`.\n   - `CancellationRequest.status = APPROVED`, `resolvedAt = NOW()`.\n2. **Publish** `BookingCancelledEvent(bookingId, cartId, seatIds, userId, reason)` via `@TransactionalEventListener(AFTER_COMMIT)`.\n   - `booking-inventory` listener releases seats (`CONFIRMED → AVAILABLE`).\n   - `engagement` listener notifies user.\n\n- `qrCodeData_format_is_bookingRef_colon_itemId` — asserts `Base64(\"{bookingRef}:{bookingItemId}\")`\n- `void_transition_active_to_voided_succeeds`\n- `void_already_voided_is_idempotent`\n\n---\n\n### `service/` — Mockito Unit Tests\n\n**`PaymentServiceTest`**\n- `createCheckout_newCart_createsBookingAndPayment_returnsClientSecret`\n- `createCheckout_duplicateCartId_returnsExistingPaymentIntentId_noStripeCall`\n- `createCheckout_stripeThrows_rollsBackTransaction`\n- `confirmPayment_stripeSucceeded_confirmsBookingAndCreatesItemsAndTickets`\n- `confirmPayment_alreadyConfirmed_returnsExistingBookingRef_noDbWrites`\n- `confirmPayment_stripeRequiresAction_throwsPaymentNotConfirmedException`\n- `confirmPayment_stripeTimeout_throwsAndLeavesBookingPending`\n- `confirmPayment_cartItemsFetchFails_rollsBackTransaction`\n- `handleFailure_setsPaymentFailedAndBookingCancelled_publishesPaymentFailedEvent`\n- `handleFailure_alreadyFailed_isNoOp`\n\n**`CancellationServiceTest`**\n- `cancel_withinWindow_fullRefund_finalisesImmediatelyOnStripeSuccess`\n- `cancel_withinWindow_partialRefund_deductsFeeFromStripeAmount`\n- `cancel_withinWindow_asyncRefund_leavesBookingCancellationPending`\n- `cancel_outsideWindow_throwsCancellationNotAllowedException`\n- `cancel_wrongStatus_pending_throwsCancellationNotAllowedException`\n- `cancel_wrongStatus_alreadyCancelled_throwsCancellationNotAllowedException`\n- `cancel_nonOwner_throwsBookingNotFoundException`\n- `cancel_stripeFails_revertsBookingToConfirmed_throwsRefundFailedException`\n- `finaliseAfterRefund_succeeds_voidsTicketsAndPublishesBookingCancelledEvent`\n- `finaliseAfterRefund_alreadyCancelled_isIdempotent`\n\n**`RefundServiceTest`**\n- `updateStatus_succeededWebhook_callsFinaliseAfterRefund`\n- `updateStatus_failedWebhook_setsRefundFailedAndLeavesBookingCancellationPending_noEventPublished`\n- `updateStatus_unknownRefundId_logsWarnAndReturns`\n\n**`ETicketServiceTest`**\n- `generate_createsOneTicketPerItem_qrDataMatchesFormat`\n- `generate_constraintViolation_returnsExistingTicket`\n- `voidTickets_setsAllStatusToVoided`\n\n---\n\n### `api/` — `@WebMvcTest`\n\n**`PaymentControllerTest`**\n- `GET /checkout/{cartId}` — `200 OK` with `clientSecret` for valid cart\n- `GET /checkout/{cartId}` — `404` for unknown cart\n- `GET /checkout/{cartId}` — `409` with existing `paymentIntentId` when payment already exists\n- `POST /confirm` — `200 OK` on `succeeded` status\n- `POST /confirm` — `402` when Stripe status is `requires_action`\n- `POST /confirm` — `409` when booking already `CONFIRMED`\n- `POST /failed` — `200 OK` triggers `PaymentFailedEvent`\n- `POST /failed` — `404` for unknown `paymentIntentId`\n\n**`BookingControllerTest`**\n- `GET /bookings` — `200 OK` with paginated results for authenticated user\n- `GET /bookings` — `401` without JWT\n- `GET /bookings/{ref}` — `200 OK` with full detail for owner\n- `GET /bookings/{ref}` — `404` for non-owner or unknown ref\n- `POST /bookings/{ref}/cancel` — `200 OK` within window\n- `POST /bookings/{ref}/cancel` — `409` outside window\n- `POST /bookings/{ref}/cancel` — `409` when status is not CONFIRMED\n- `POST /bookings/{ref}/cancel` — `404` for non-owner\n\n**`ETicketControllerTest`**\n- `GET /tickets/{ref}` — `200 OK` with ticket list for owner\n- `GET /tickets/{ref}` — `404` for non-owner\n\n**`StripeWebhookControllerTest`**\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `400` on invalid `Stripe-Signature`\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on `payment_intent.succeeded` (idempotent confirm)\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on `payment_intent.payment_failed` (publishes event)\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on `refund.updated` with `status=succeeded`\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on `refund.failed` (logs alert, no event)\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on unknown event type (silent)\n- `POST /webhooks/stripe` — `200` on unknown `paymentIntentId` (logs WARN, no-op)\n\n**`InternalPaymentControllerTest`** (extend existing stub)\n- `GET /internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}` — `{ confirmed: true }` when booking is CONFIRMED\n- `GET /internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}` — `{ confirmed: false }` when no CONFIRMED booking\n\n---\n\n### `arch/` — ArchUnit\n\n**`PaymentsTicketingArchTest`**\n- `no_class_in_paymentsticketing_imports_from_bookinginventory_package` — classes in `com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing` must not import any class from `com.eventplatform.bookinginventory`\n- `no_class_in_paymentsticketing_imports_from_scheduling_package` — same for `com.eventplatform.scheduling`\n- `no_class_in_paymentsticketing_imports_from_identity_package` — same for `com.eventplatform.identity`\n- `no_ControllerAdvice_annotation_in_paymentsticketing_package` — `@ControllerAdvice` must not appear; error handling is in `shared/`\n- `no_stripe_sdk_import_outside_shared_stripe_package` — classes outside `com.eventplatform.shared.stripe` must not import `com.stripe.*` directly\n\n---\n\n## Open Questions\n\n1. **`bookingRef` sequence at scale:** Current design uses an in-memory `AtomicLong` reset daily. If the app runs on multiple pods, sequences will collide. In a single-instance deployment this is fine. For multi-instance, replace with a DB sequence (`nextval`) or a UUID-based ref. Defer to ops decision before launch.\n\n2. **Cart items REST contract:** `GET /api/v1/booking/carts/{cartId}/items` is called from `payments-ticketing` during booking confirmation. This endpoint must be verified to exist in `booking-inventory` as part of FR4 implementation. Add to pre-FR5 checklist if not present.\n\n3. **Cancellation window source:** `slotStartTime` is fetched via REST to `scheduling`. If the scheduling service is temporarily unavailable, cancellation requests will fail. Consider caching `slotStartTime` on the `Booking` record at creation time to avoid a cross-module call on the cancellation hot path.\n\n4. **PDF generation:** E-ticket `pdfUrl` is currently a placeholder path. Actual PDF generation (e.g. via iText or a PDF microservice) is deferred. The `ETicketService` should expose a `generatePdf(Long bookingItemId)` method stub for future implementation.\n\n5. **`payments.cancellation.fee-percent` config:** Currently a flat global percentage. Per-event or per-organiser cancellation policies are out of scope for FR5. If required in future, a `cancellation_policy` table should be introduced in `payments-ticketing`.\n"
  }
}
```

{

## Entry 703
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T17:57:18.718Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T17:57:18.718Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_oONPOvtNpfNDhi9EST1mjgMo",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: POQ/Payments/SPEC_5.md\n@@\n **`payments-ticketing`:**\n - `domain/Booking.java`, `domain/Payment.java`\n - `domain/enums/BookingStatus.java`, `domain/enums/PaymentStatus.java`\n - `repository/BookingRepository.java`, `repository/PaymentRepository.java`\n-- `api/internal/InternalPaymentController.java`\n - `event/listener/CartAssembledListener.java` (stub)\n - `event/listener/BookingConfirmedByPaymentListener.java` (stub)\n@@\n ├── api/\n │   ├── PaymentControllerTest.java\n │   ├── BookingControllerTest.java\n │   ├── ETicketControllerTest.java\n-│   ├── StripeWebhookControllerTest.java\n-│   └── InternalPaymentControllerTest.java (extend existing stub)\n+│   └── StripeWebhookControllerTest.java\n+├── service/\n+│   └── PaymentConfirmationReaderImplTest.java\n └── arch/\n     └── PaymentsTicketingArchTest.java\n ```\n@@\n-### `GET /api/v1/internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}`\n-\n-**Auth:** No public JWT — internal path; permitted via `SecurityConfig` pattern rule; restrict to internal network in production\n-**Purpose:** Answers `booking-inventory`'s `PaymentTimeoutWatchdog` — is payment confirmed for this cart?\n-\n-**Response `200 OK`:**\n-```json\n-{ \"cartId\": 42, \"confirmed\": true }\n-```\n-\n----\n-\n ### `POST /api/v1/webhooks/stripe`\n@@\n-**`InternalPaymentControllerTest`** (extend existing stub)\n-- `GET /internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}` — `{ confirmed: true }` when booking is CONFIRMED\n-- `GET /internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}` — `{ confirmed: false }` when no CONFIRMED booking\n+**`PaymentConfirmationReaderImplTest`**\n+- `isPaymentConfirmed_returnsTrue_whenBookingExistsWithConfirmedStatus`\n+- `isPaymentConfirmed_returnsFalse_whenNoConfirmedBookingExists`\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**
```json
{
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_oONPOvtNpfNDhi9EST1mjgMo",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: POQ/Payments/SPEC_5.md\n@@\n **`payments-ticketing`:**\n - `domain/Booking.java`, `domain/Payment.java`\n - `domain/enums/BookingStatus.java`, `domain/enums/PaymentStatus.java`\n - `repository/BookingRepository.java`, `repository/PaymentRepository.java`\n-- `api/internal/InternalPaymentController.java`\n - `event/listener/CartAssembledListener.java` (stub)\n - `event/listener/BookingConfirmedByPaymentListener.java` (stub)\n@@\n ├── api/\n │   ├── PaymentControllerTest.java\n │   ├── BookingControllerTest.java\n │   ├── ETicketControllerTest.java\n-│   ├── StripeWebhookControllerTest.java\n-│   └── InternalPaymentControllerTest.java (extend existing stub)\n+│   └── StripeWebhookControllerTest.java\n+├── service/\n+│   └── PaymentConfirmationReaderImplTest.java\n └── arch/\n     └── PaymentsTicketingArchTest.java\n ```\n@@\n-### `GET /api/v1/internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}`\n-\n-**Auth:** No public JWT — internal path; permitted via `SecurityConfig` pattern rule; restrict to internal network in production\n-**Purpose:** Answers `booking-inventory`'s `PaymentTimeoutWatchdog` — is payment confirmed for this cart?\n-\n-**Response `200 OK`:**\n-```json\n-{ \"cartId\": 42, \"confirmed\": true }\n-```\n-\n----\n-\n ### `POST /api/v1/webhooks/stripe`\n@@\n-**`InternalPaymentControllerTest`** (extend existing stub)\n-- `GET /internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}` — `{ confirmed: true }` when booking is CONFIRMED\n-- `GET /internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}` — `{ confirmed: false }` when no CONFIRMED booking\n+**`PaymentConfirmationReaderImplTest`**\n+- `isPaymentConfirmed_returnsTrue_whenBookingExistsWithConfirmedStatus`\n+- `isPaymentConfirmed_returnsFalse_whenNoConfirmedBookingExists`\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"cat > booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/CartSnapshotReaderImpl.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.CartItemRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.dto.CartItemSnapshotDto;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.CartSnapshotReader;\\nimport java.util.List;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class CartSnapshotReaderImpl implements CartSnapshotReader {\\n\\n    private final CartItemRepository cartItemRepository;\\n\\n    public CartSnapshotReaderImpl(CartItemRepository cartItemRepository) {\\n        this.cartItemRepository = cartItemRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public List<CartItemSnapshotDto> getCartItems(Long cartId) {\\n        return cartItemRepository.findByCartId(cartId).stream()\\n            .map(item -> new CartItemSnapshotDto(\\n                item.getId(),\\n                item.getSeatId(),\\n                item.getGaClaimId(),\\n                item.getEbTicketClassId(),\\n                item.getBasePrice().amount().longValue(),\\n                item.getBasePrice().currency().toLowerCase(),\\n                item.getQuantity()\\n            ))\\n            .toList();\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\\n\\ncat > payments-ticketing/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/PaymentConfirmationReaderImpl.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.PaymentConfirmationReader;\\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Service;\\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\\n\\n@Service\\npublic class PaymentConfirmationReaderImpl implements PaymentConfirmationReader {\\n\\n    private final BookingRepository bookingRepository;\\n\\n    public PaymentConfirmationReaderImpl(BookingRepository bookingRepository) {\\n        this.bookingRepository = bookingRepository;\\n    }\\n\\n    @Override\\n    @Transactional(readOnly = true)\\n    public boolean isPaymentConfirmed(Long cartId) {\\n        return cartId != null && bookingRepository.existsByCartIdAndStatus(cartId, BookingStatus.CONFIRMED);\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_SN3bHUqwNx4FenYF8HJT2xpV"
  }
}

List.of() : items;\n-    }\n-\n-    public record CartItemSnapshot(\n-        Long itemId,\n-        Long seatId,\n-        Long gaClaimId,\n-        String ticketClassId,\n-        Long unitPrice,\n-        String currency,\n-        Integer quantity\n-    ) {\n-    }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}

## Entry 723
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T17:58:06.431Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T17:58:06.431Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_FtvW8MEbsN7Kf0sN6uRxYfp4",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: booking-inventory/src/main/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/scheduler/PaymentTimeoutWatchdog.java\n@@\n import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.CartItemRepository;\n import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatLockAuditLogRepository;\n import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatRepository;\n import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.CartService;\n-import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.client.PaymentStatusClient;\n import com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis.SeatLockRedisService;\n+import com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.PaymentConfirmationReader;\n@@\n- * <p>Payment confirmation check delegates to {@link PaymentStatusClient} which\n- * calls {@code GET /internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}/status} in payments-ticketing.\n- * If the call fails (module not yet live, network issue), the default is {@code false}\n- * — safe because confirmed payments always transition the seat to CONFIRMED state first.\n+ * <p>Payment confirmation check delegates to {@link PaymentConfirmationReader}\n+ * from shared/common/service.\n  */\n@@\n-    private final PaymentStatusClient paymentStatusClient;\n+    private final PaymentConfirmationReader paymentConfirmationReader;\n@@\n         CartItemRepository cartItemRepository,\n         SeatLockAuditLogRepository auditRepository,\n         SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService,\n-        PaymentStatusClient paymentStatusClient,\n+        PaymentConfirmationReader paymentConfirmationReader,\n         CartService cartService\n     ) {\n@@\n         this.cartItemRepository = cartItemRepository;\n         this.auditRepository = auditRepository;\n         this.seatLockRedisService = seatLockRedisService;\n-        this.paymentStatusClient = paymentStatusClient;\n+        this.paymentConfirmationReader = paymentConfirmationReader;\n         this.cartService = cartService;\n@@\n-     * Uses PaymentStatusClient (REST call to payments-ticketing internal API).\n+     * Uses shared PaymentConfirmationReader.\n      */\n     private boolean isPaymentConfirmed(Seat seat) {\n         Long cartId = cartItemRepository.findFirstBySeatId(seat.getId())\n             .map(item -> item.getCart().getId())\n             .orElse(null);\n-        return paymentStatusClient.isPaymentConfirmed(cartId);\n+        return paymentConfirmationReader.isPaymentConfirmed(cartId);\n     }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

always transition the seat to CONFIRMED state first.\n+ * <p>Payment confirmation check delegates to {@link PaymentConfirmationReader}\n+ * from shared/common/service.\n  */\n@@\n-    private final PaymentStatusClient paymentStatusClient;\n+    private final PaymentConfirmationReader paymentConfirmationReader;\n@@\n         CartItemRepository cartItemRepository,\n this.seatLockRedisService = seatLockRedisService;\n-        this.paymentStatusClient = paymentStatusClient;\n+        this.paymentConfirmationReader = paymentConfirmationReader;\n         this.cartService = cartService;\n@@\n-     * Uses PaymentStatusClient (REST call to payments-ticketing internal API).\n+     * Uses shared PaymentConfirmationReader.\n      */\n     private boolean isPaymentConfirmed(Seat seat) {\n         Long cartId = cartItemRepository.findFirstBySeatId(seat.getId())\n             .map(item -> item.getCart().getId())\n             .orElse(null);\n-        return paymentStatusClient.isPaymentConfirmed(cartId);\n+        return paymentConfirmationReader.isPaymentConfirmed(cartId);\n     }\n }\n*** End Patch\n"

## Entry 755
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T17:59:35.111Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T17:59:35.111Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "custom_tool_call",
    "status": "completed",
    "call_id": "call_2p102awfr2ewBTXwYvaXvWIH",
    "name": "apply_patch",
    "input": "*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: POQ/Payments/SPEC_5.md\n@@\n ### Area H — Internal Payment Status API (Cross-Module)\n \n-- `[MUST]` Expose `GET /api/v1/internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}` (internal — no public JWT) for `booking-inventory`'s `PaymentTimeoutWatchdog`\n-- `[MUST]` Return `{ confirmed: true/false }` based on whether a `CONFIRMED` booking exists for the cart\n+- `[MUST]` Provide `PaymentConfirmationReader` in `shared/common/service/` for `booking-inventory`'s `PaymentTimeoutWatchdog`\n+- `[MUST]` `PaymentConfirmationReader.isPaymentConfirmed(cartId)` returns `true/false` based on whether a `CONFIRMED` booking exists for the cart\n@@\n ├── service/\n │   ├── PaymentServiceTest.java\n │   ├── CancellationServiceTest.java\n │   ├── RefundServiceTest.java\n-│   └── ETicketServiceTest.java\n+│   ├── ETicketServiceTest.java\n+│   └── PaymentConfirmationReaderImplTest.java\n ├── api/\n │   ├── PaymentControllerTest.java\n │   ├── BookingControllerTest.java\n │   ├── ETicketControllerTest.java\n │   └── StripeWebhookControllerTest.java\n-├── service/\n-│   └── PaymentConfirmationReaderImplTest.java\n └── arch/\n     └── PaymentsTicketingArchTest.java\n ```\n@@\n-### 6.6 — Internal Watchdog API (`InternalPaymentController`)\n-\n-`GET /api/v1/internal/payments/by-cart/{cartId}`:\n-- Query `bookingRepository.existsByCartIdAndStatus(cartId, CONFIRMED)`.\n-- Return `{ \"cartId\": cartId, \"confirmed\": result }`.\n-- No authentication — permitted via `SecurityConfig` `.requestMatchers(\"/api/v1/internal/**\").permitAll()`.\n+### 6.6 — Internal Watchdog Read Path (`PaymentConfirmationReader`)\n+\n+`PaymentConfirmationReader.isPaymentConfirmed(cartId)`:\n+- Implemented in `payments-ticketing` as `PaymentConfirmationReaderImpl`.\n+- Queries `bookingRepository.existsByCartIdAndStatus(cartId, CONFIRMED)`.\n+- Consumed by `booking-inventory` `PaymentTimeoutWatchdog` through `shared/common/service/` interface injection (no internal HTTP call).\n*** End Patch\n"
  }
}
```

call).\n*** End Patch\n"

## Entry 760
**Timestamp:** 2026-03-04T17:59:46.784Z
**Role/Type:** response_item
**Content:**
```json
{
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T17:59:46.784Z",
  "type": "response_item",
  "payload": {
    "type": "function_call",
    "name": "exec_command",
    "arguments": "{\"cmd\":\"rm -f payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/api/internal/InternalPaymentControllerTest.java booking-inventory/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/bookinginventory/service/client/PaymentStatusClientTest.java && mkdir -p payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service && cat > payments-ticketing/src/test/java/com/eventplatform/paymentsticketing/service/PaymentConfirmationReaderImplTest.java <<'EOF'\\npackage com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.service;\\n\\nimport static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.mock;\\nimport static org.mockito.Mockito.when;\\n\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.domain.enums.BookingStatus;\\nimport com.eventplatform.paymentsticketing.repository.BookingRepository;\\nimport org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;\\n\\nclass PaymentConfirmationReaderImplTest {\\n\\n    private final BookingRepository bookingRepository = mock(BookingRepository.class);\\n    private final PaymentConfirmationReaderImpl reader = new PaymentConfirmationReaderImpl(bookingRepository);\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void isPaymentConfirmed_returnsTrue_whenBookingIsConfirmed() {\\n        when(bookingRepository.existsByCartIdAndStatus(10L, BookingStatus.CONFIRMED)).thenReturn(true);\\n\\n        assertThat(reader.isPaymentConfirmed(10L)).isTrue();\\n    }\\n\\n    @Test\\n    void isPaymentConfirmed_returnsFalse_whenCartIdNullOrNotConfirmed() {\\n        when(bookingRepository.existsByCartIdAndStatus(11L, BookingStatus.CONFIRMED)).thenReturn(false);\\n\\n        assertThat(reader.isPaymentConfirmed(null)).isFalse();\\n        assertThat(reader.isPaymentConfirmed(11L)).isFalse();\\n    }\\n}\\nEOF\"}",
    "call_id": "call_S23wTwreFdfqxSsjUT1jMtcP"
  }
}
```
**Metadata:**

com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.Seat;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.SeatLockAuditLog;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.LockReleaseReason;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockEvent;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.domain.enums.SeatLockState;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.CartItemRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatLockAuditLogRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.repository.SeatRepository;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.CartService;\nimport com.eventplatform.bookinginventory.service.redis.SeatLockRedisService;\nimport com.eventplatform.shared.common.service.PaymentConfirmationReader;\nimport java.time.Instant;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;\nimport org.springframework.scheduling.annotation.Scheduled;\nimport org.springframework.stereotype.Component;\nimport org.springframework.transaction.annotation.Transactional;\n\n/**\n * Scheduled watchdog that releases HARD_LOCKED / PAYMENT_PENDING seat locks\n * whose TTL has expired without a confirmed Stripe payment.\n *\n * <p>Payment confirmation check delegates to {@link PaymentConfirmationReader}\n * from shared/common/service.\n */\n@Slf4j\n@Component\npublic class PaymentTimeoutWatchdog {\n\n    private final SeatRepository seatRepository;\n    private final CartItemRepository cartItemRepository;\n    private final SeatLockAuditLogRepository auditRepository;\n    private final SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService;\n    private final PaymentConfirmationReader paymentConfirmationReader;\n    private final CartService cartService;\n\n    public PaymentTimeoutWatchdog(\n        SeatRepository seatRepository,\n        CartItemRepository cartItemRepository,\n        SeatLockAuditLogRepository auditRepository,\n        SeatLockRedisService seatLockRedisService,\n        PaymentConfirmationReader paymentConfirmationReader,\n        CartService cartService\n    ) {\n        this.seatRepository = seatRepository;\n        this.cartItemRepository = cartItemRepository;\n        this.auditRepository = auditRepository;\n        this.seatLockRedisService = seatLockRedisService;\n        this.paymentConfirmationReader = paymentConfirmationReader;\n        this.cartService = cartService;\n    }\n\n    @Scheduled(fixedDelay = 60000)\n    @Transactional\n    public void releaseTimedOutPaymentLocks() {\n        List<Seat> candidates = seatRepository.findAll().stream()\n            .filter(seat -> (seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.HARD_LOCKED ||\n                seat.getLockState() == SeatLockState.PAYMENT_PENDING)\n                && seat.getLockedUntil() != null\n                && seat.getLockedUntil().isBefore(Instant.now()))\n            .toList();\n\n        for (Seat seat : candidates) {\n            try {\n                if (isPaymentConfirmed(seat)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n                SeatLockState from = seat.getLockState();\n                Long userId = seat.getLockedByUserId();\n                seat.release(LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_TIMEOUT);\n                seatRepository.save(seat);\n                if (userId != null) {\n                    seatLockRedisService.release(seat.getId(), userId);\n                }\n                auditRepository.save(new SeatLockAuditLog(\n                    seat.getId(),\n                    null,\n                    seat.getShowSlotId(),\n                    userId,\n                    from,\n                    SeatLockState.AVAILABLE,\n                    SeatLockEvent.RELEASE,\n                    LockReleaseReason.PAYMENT_TIMEOUT.name(),\n                    null\n                ));\n                if (userId != null) {\n                    cartService.handlePaymentTimeout(null, List.of(seat.getId()), userId);\n                }\n            } catch (Exception ex) {\n                log.warn(\"Payment timeout watchdog skip seatId={} reason={}\", seat.getId(), ex.getMessage());\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Checks whether a confirmed payment exists for the cart that contains this seat.\n     * Uses shared PaymentConfirmationReader.\n     */\n    private boolean isPaymentConfirmed(Seat seat) {\n        Long cartId = cartItemRepository.findFirstBySeatId(seat.getId())\n            .map(item -> item.getCart().getId())\n            .orElse(null);\n        return paymentConfirmationReader.isPaymentConfirmed(cartId);\n    }\n}\n"
  }
}
